query: Omni-Biotic Stress Release AB 10 Balance Hetox Panda Power Stress Release Kids AB 10 Kids
answer: Omni‑Biotic offers a range of probiotic formulas each tailored to specific needs and age groups: Omni‑Biotic Stress Release contains nine clinically selected strains aimed at supporting the gut‑brain axis, digestion and stress resilience; it is safe for children over three years at the full adult dose and for ages one to three at half a sachet, while infants should use Omni‑Biotic Panda instead. Omni‑Biotic AB 10 provides ten well‑characterized strains for broad gut restoration, especially after antibiotics, and follows the same age‑based dosing rules (full dose for > 3 yr, half dose for 1‑3 yr). Omni‑Biotic AB 10 Kids is a child‑friendly version of the AB 10 blend, formulated without refrigeration to gently restore gut diversity during or after antibiotic use and can be taken alongside other supplements after consulting a pediatrician. Omni‑Biotic Balance delivers a ten‑strain blend for overall digestive health and immune support, also safe for children with the same dosing guidelines. Omni‑Biotic Hetox targets the gut‑liver axis and detoxification; it is not recommended for children under three and should only be given to older children under professional supervision. Omni‑Biotic Panda is specifically designed for infants and toddlers up to three years, supporting early gut microbiome development, with dosing via a single sachet mixed into breast milk, formula or water. Omni‑Biotic Power is promoted for individuals facing high stress, IBS or inflammatory bowel conditions, using the same nine‑strain Stress Release base and recommended as one sachet daily on an empty stomach. Finally, Omni‑Biotic Stress Release Kids is a kid‑sized version of the Stress Release formula containing nine strains to aid digestion, emotional balance and stress resilience in school‑age children, safe for regular use after pediatric approval.

results.title: Omni-Biotic Stress Release Probiotic
results.content:
#### Is Omni-Biotic Stress Release Safe For Children?

Yes, most OMNi-BiOTiC® probiotics are safe for children.

For babies and up to one year of age: Omni-Biotic Panda was specifically developed for babies and young children to support the healthy development of the baby’s gut microbiome, digestive system, and immune function. It has also been shown in clinical studies to improve symptoms of infant colic and to reduce the risk of childhood allergies, such as eczema.

For children between one and three years of age: If the child is benefiting from Omni-Biotic Panda, this is often a good choice to continue until three years of age. Other probiotic formulations (except Omni-Biotic HETOX) can be taken at half of one sachet per day (i.e., half of the daily recommended dose for adults). [...] ## Recommended Use

Take one sachet daily or as directed by your healthcare practitioner. Omni-Biotic AB 10 is best consumed on an empty stomach, for example right after waking up in the morning or before going to bed in the evening.

## Composition

Omni-Biotic Stress Release contains nine specially selected bacterial strains:

Other ingredients: Non-GMO corn starch, maltodextrin, inulin, potassium chloride, plant protein (rice), magnesium sulfate, fructo-oligosaccharides (FOS), amylase, manganese sulfate

## Shipping & Returns

Free shipping for orders over $100. FedEx 2-day shipping for regular orders.

Returns must be initiated within 30 days of receiving your order.

Couldn't load pickup availability [...] For children older than three years of age: Children above three years of age typically respond well to taking the regular daily recommended dose.

To improve the taste of the probiotic, you can dissolve it in infant formula, milk or yogurt, a dairy alternative, lukewarm soups and apple juice. Avoid juices that are too acidic such as orange juice as these negatively impact the probiotic bacteria.

## Customer Reviews

Used these probiotics for my kids and it helped them so much!

I’ve noticed feeling slightly calmer, just started it so I’m hoping it will get even better

Hoping the benefits continue to come, but enjoying so far

## FAQ

#### How Should I Best Take Omni-Biotic Stress Release?

For Omni-Biotic Stress Release probiotic, please follow these intake instructions:

Omni-Biotic Stress Release can be taken once or twice daily.

#### Can I Mix Omni-Biotic Stress Release Into Anything Other Than Water?

Yes. Omni-Biotic probiotics can also be mixed into non-acidic liquids such as apple juice, milk or yogurt (or non-dairy alternatives), apple sauce and lukewarm soups. Acidic beverages such as coffee, tea and orange juice should be avoided. Make sure the liquid does not exceed 104 degrees Fahrenheit as this can kill the probiotics.

#### Can I Take Omni-Biotic Stress Release More Than Once Daily?

Yes, Omni-Biotic Stress Release can be taken twice daily, especially if you are experiencing persistent stress-related digestive issues and / or are living a high stress lifestyle. In most cases, taking Omni-Biotic Stress Release once daily is sufficient.

#### Can I Take Omni-Biotic Stress Release On An Empty Stomach, Or Should I Take The Probiotic With Food / A Meal?

All Omni-Biotic probiotics are best taken on an empty stomach. This helps the probiotic bacteria move through the acidic environment of the stomach as quickly as possible, and they reach their destination in the intestines alive and metabolically active.

#### Can I Take Omni-Biotic Stress Release With Other Supplements And / Or Medications?

Yes. Omni-Biotic probiotics contain only strains of bacteria that naturally occur in the human intestine, and no chemical agents that can interact with other supplements or medications.

#### What Are The Probiotic Strains Included In Omni-Biotic Stress Release?

Omni-Biotic Stress Release contains nine specifically selected, scientifically tested, well-characterized probiotic strains:

#### Why Are There Other Ingredients In Addition To The Probiotics In Omni-Biotic Stress Release?

The other ingredients included in Omni-Biotic Stress Release are: Non-GMO corn starch, maltodextrin, inulin, potassium chloride, magnesium sulphate, fructo-oligosaccharides (FOS), enzymes (amylases), manganese sulphate.

These ingredients are specifically added to improve the delivery of the probiotic bacteria to the intestines. A small amount of non-GMO corn starch acts as the carrier. The other ingredients are prebiotic nutrient that serve as the food for the probiotics. When the powder is dissolved in liquid, the probiotics can hydrate and consume these specialized nutrients, and become strong for their passage through the digestive tract to the intestines where they will be most effective.

#### How Does Omni-Biotic Stress Release Help With Stress Management And Brain Function?

Stress negatively impacts your gut microbiome in several ways. Stress puts the body in fight or flight mode, which redirects blood flow away from the digestive organs. This can lead to digestive disturbances such as diarrhea, constipation and bloating. Prolonged periods of stress can also kill the good bacteria in the gut, contribute to a gut microbiome imbalance, and cause inflammation. Furthermore, the gut and the brain stand in constant communication with one another. In fact, 95% of the happiness hormone serotonin is produced in the gut. A disturbed gut flora can disrupt brain function, including mood, concentration and sleep.

#### How Does Omni-Biotic Stress Release Help Manage Irritable Bowel Syndrome?

The probiotic strains in Omni-Biotic Stress Release strengthen the gut barrier, help reduce inflammation in the colon and increase bacterial diversity in the gut. Omni-Biotic Stress Release was tested in a clinical study with IBS patients. After 4 weeks of taking Omni-Biotic Stress Release, patients reported an 80% reduction in symptom severity. In addition, bacterial diversity increased, gut barrier function improved, and anti-inflammatory effects were observed in the colon.

#### How Many Colony Forming Units (CFU) Are In Omni-Biotic Stress Release?

Omni-Biotic Stress Release contains 7.5 billion CFU per serving/sachet.

#### How Many Servings Are In One Box Of Omni-Biotic Stress Release?

One box of Omni-Biotic Stress Release includes 28 servings. This probiotic is shelf stable through the expiration date at room temperature.

#### Do I Have To Refrigerate This Probiotic?

No, Omni-Biotic Stress Release does not need to be refrigerated.

#### Do Omni-Biotic Probiotics Have Regulatory Approval?

All Omni-Biotic products meet “Generally Recognized As Safe” (GRAS) criteria specified by the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA).

Our products are developed by Institut AllergoSan in accordance with the highest quality criteria for probiotics presented by the FDA, World Health Organization (WHO), World Gastroenterology Organization (WGO), and Austrian/German Societies for Probiotic Medicine (OePROM / DePROM).

#### What Kind Of Testing Do You Do On Omni-Biotic Probiotics?

Omni-Biotic probiotics are developed by Institut AllergoSan “Competence Center for Microbiome Research,” based on over 25 years of gut microbiome research and 100+ clinical studies using our products. Each strain of probiotic bacteria is tested for how effective it is in achieving a specific health outcome. The team then tests the combination of strains that is included in one Omni-Biotic probiotic to make sure they work well together to achieve a desired outcome. All Omni-Biotic probiotics are tested for efficacy in their final version in clinical studies. Key clinical studies using Omni-Biotic can be found in the [Research / Education website section.](/pages/research "Research")

#### Where Can I Find The Clinical Studies That Test Omni-Biotic Stress Release?

You can find the clinical studies using Omni-Biotic Stress Release here: [http://www.omnibioticlife.com/research-education/gut-brain-axis](/pages/gut-brain-axis "Gut-Brain Axis")

#### Are Omni-Biotic Probiotics Suitable For Vegetarians And Vegans?

All Omni-Biotic probiotics available on omnibioticlife.com are vegan, lactose, gluten, and soy-free, and made up of non-GMO ingredients.

#### Can Omni-Biotic Be Used When Trying To Conceive, During Pregnancy, Postpartum And While Breastfeeding?

Yes, all Omni-Biotic probiotics are safe for use when trying to conceive, during pregnancy, postpartum and while breastfeeding.

In fact, supporting gut health via probiotics and prebiotics during pregnancy and the first few months after birth will help support a healthy pregnancy and lay the foundation for the infant’s health. Check out our prenatal and infant probiotic [here](https://www.omnibioticlife.com/product-category/prenatal-infant-support/).

#### Is Omni-Biotic Stress Release Safe For Children?

Yes, most OMNi-BiOTiC® probiotics are safe for children.

**For babies and up to one year of age**: Omni-Biotic Panda was specifically developed for babies and young children to support the healthy development of the baby’s gut microbiome, digestive system, and immune function. It has also been shown in clinical studies to improve symptoms of infant colic and to reduce the risk of childhood allergies, such as eczema.

**For children between one and three years of age**: If the child is benefiting from Omni-Biotic Panda, this is often a good choice to continue until three years of age. Other probiotic formulations (except Omni-Biotic HETOX) can be taken at half of one sachet per day (i.e., half of the daily recommended dose for adults).

**For children older than three years of age**: Children above three years of age typically respond well to taking the regular daily recommended dose.

To improve the taste of the probiotic, you can dissolve it in infant formula, milk or yogurt, a dairy alternative, lukewarm soups and apple juice. Avoid juices that are too acidic such as orange juice as these negatively impact the probiotic bacteria.

## Customer Reviews

Used these probiotics for my kids and it helped them so much!

I’ve noticed feeling slightly calmer, just started it so I’m hoping it will get even better

Hoping the benefits continue to come, but enjoying so far

I’ve been taking different very expensive brands of probiotics at least 10 years. There was a period where I was on antibiotics off and on for about a year 5 times that completely destroyed my gut microbiomes as well as daily stresses in life.
  
I was introduced to Omni first in Europe in auditora at a very well known medical health spa by my doctor there. Within a month my discomfort changes and when I discovered that I can order in the US I was ecstatic. They have so many different varieties for different situations….it is helpful to have a doctor or pharmacist who has experience to help guide you to which one you may need at what time, but it has healed my gut. Out of all the probiotics I’ve tried I would say it is #1. I only wish that it wasn’t so expensive.

I’ve noticed a meaningful difference since starting Omni-Biotic Stress Release. My physical and mental energy feel more steady throughout the day, my mood has improved, and I feel better able to handle stress. It’s been a gentle but noticeable shift toward feeling calmer, more balanced, and more energized. I’m so grateful I found this product.

## FAQ

#### How Should I Best Take Omni-Biotic Stress Release?

For Omni-Biotic Stress Release probiotic, please follow these intake instructions:

Omni-Biotic Stress Release can be taken once or twice daily.

#### Can I Mix Omni-Biotic Stress Release Into Anything Other Than Water?

Yes. Omni-Biotic probiotics can also be mixed into non-acidic liquids such as apple juice, milk or yogurt (or non-dairy alternatives), apple sauce and lukewarm soups. Acidic beverages such as coffee, tea and orange juice should be avoided. Make sure the liquid does not exceed 104 degrees Fahrenheit as this can kill the probiotics.

#### Can I Take Omni-Biotic Stress Release More Than Once Daily?

Yes, Omni-Biotic Stress Release can be taken twice daily, especially if you are experiencing persistent stress-related digestive issues and / or are living a high stress lifestyle. In most cases, taking Omni-Biotic Stress Release once daily is sufficient.

#### Can I Take Omni-Biotic Stress Release On An Empty Stomach, Or Should I Take The Probiotic With Food / A Meal?

All Omni-Biotic probiotics are best taken on an empty stomach. This helps the probiotic bacteria move through the acidic environment of the stomach as quickly as possible, and they reach their destination in the intestines alive and metabolically active.

#### Can I Take Omni-Biotic Stress Release With Other Supplements And / Or Medications?

Yes. Omni-Biotic probiotics contain only strains of bacteria that naturally occur in the human intestine, and no chemical agents that can interact with other supplements or medications.

#### What Are The Probiotic Strains Included In Omni-Biotic Stress Release?

Omni-Biotic Stress Release contains nine specifically selected, scientifically tested, well-characterized probiotic strains:

#### Why Are There Other Ingredients In Addition To The Probiotics In Omni-Biotic Stress Release?

The other ingredients included in Omni-Biotic Stress Release are: Non-GMO corn starch, maltodextrin, inulin, potassium chloride, magnesium sulphate, fructo-oligosaccharides (FOS), enzymes (amylases), manganese sulphate.

These ingredients are specifically added to improve the delivery of the probiotic bacteria to the intestines. A small amount of non-GMO corn starch acts as the carrier. The other ingredients are prebiotic nutrient that serve as the food for the probiotics. When the powder is dissolved in liquid, the probiotics can hydrate and consume these specialized nutrients, and become strong for their passage through the digestive tract to the intestines where they will be most effective.

#### How Does Omni-Biotic Stress Release Help With Stress Management And Brain Function?

Stress negatively impacts your gut microbiome in several ways. Stress puts the body in fight or flight mode, which redirects blood flow away from the digestive organs. This can lead to digestive disturbances such as diarrhea, constipation and bloating. Prolonged periods of stress can also kill the good bacteria in the gut, contribute to a gut microbiome imbalance, and cause inflammation. Furthermore, the gut and the brain stand in constant communication with one another. In fact, 95% of the happiness hormone serotonin is produced in the gut. A disturbed gut flora can disrupt brain function, including mood, concentration and sleep.

#### How Does Omni-Biotic Stress Release Help Manage Irritable Bowel Syndrome?

The probiotic strains in Omni-Biotic Stress Release strengthen the gut barrier, help reduce inflammation in the colon and increase bacterial diversity in the gut. Omni-Biotic Stress Release was tested in a clinical study with IBS patients. After 4 weeks of taking Omni-Biotic Stress Release, patients reported an 80% reduction in symptom severity. In addition, bacterial diversity increased, gut barrier function improved, and anti-inflammatory effects were observed in the colon.

#### How Many Colony Forming Units (CFU) Are In Omni-Biotic Stress Release?

Omni-Biotic Stress Release contains 7.5 billion CFU per serving/sachet.

#### How Many Servings Are In One Box Of Omni-Biotic Stress Release?

One box of Omni-Biotic Stress Release includes 28 servings. This probiotic is shelf stable through the expiration date at room temperature.

#### Do I Have To Refrigerate This Probiotic?

No, Omni-Biotic Stress Release does not need to be refrigerated.

#### Do Omni-Biotic Probiotics Have Regulatory Approval?

All Omni-Biotic products meet “Generally Recognized As Safe” (GRAS) criteria specified by the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA).

Our products are developed by Institut AllergoSan in accordance with the highest quality criteria for probiotics presented by the FDA, World Health Organization (WHO), World Gastroenterology Organization (WGO), and Austrian/German Societies for Probiotic Medicine (OePROM / DePROM).

#### What Kind Of Testing Do You Do On Omni-Biotic Probiotics?

Omni-Biotic probiotics are developed by Institut AllergoSan “Competence Center for Microbiome Research,” based on over 25 years of gut microbiome research and 100+ clinical studies using our products. Each strain of probiotic bacteria is tested for how effective it is in achieving a specific health outcome. The team then tests the combination of strains that is included in one Omni-Biotic probiotic to make sure they work well together to achieve a desired outcome. All Omni-Biotic probiotics are tested for efficacy in their final version in clinical studies. Key clinical studies using Omni-Biotic can be found in the [Research / Education website section.](/pages/research "Research")

#### Where Can I Find The Clinical Studies That Test Omni-Biotic Stress Release?

You can find the clinical studies using Omni-Biotic Stress Release here: [http://www.omnibioticlife.com/research-education/gut-brain-axis](/pages/gut-brain-axis "Gut-Brain Axis")

#### Are Omni-Biotic Probiotics Suitable For Vegetarians And Vegans?

All Omni-Biotic probiotics available on omnibioticlife.com are vegan, lactose, gluten, and soy-free, and made up of non-GMO ingredients.

#### Can Omni-Biotic Be Used When Trying To Conceive, During Pregnancy, Postpartum And While Breastfeeding?

Yes, all Omni-Biotic probiotics are safe for use when trying to conceive, during pregnancy, postpartum and while breastfeeding.

In fact, supporting gut health via probiotics and prebiotics during pregnancy and the first few months after birth will help support a healthy pregnancy and lay the foundation for the infant’s health. Check out our prenatal and infant probiotic [here](https://www.omnibioticlife.com/product-category/prenatal-infant-support/).

#### Is Omni-Biotic Stress Release Safe For Children?

Yes, most OMNi-BiOTiC® probiotics are safe for children.

**For babies and up to one year of age**: Omni-Biotic Panda was specifically developed for babies and young children to support the healthy development of the baby’s gut microbiome, digestive system, and immune function. It has also been shown in clinical studies to improve symptoms of infant colic and to reduce the risk of childhood allergies, such as eczema.

**For children between one and three years of age**: If the child is benefiting from Omni-Biotic Panda, this is often a good choice to continue until three years of age. Other probiotic formulations (except Omni-Biotic HETOX) can be taken at half of one sachet per day (i.e., half of the daily recommended dose for adults).

**For children older than three years of age**: Children above three years of age typically respond well to taking the regular daily recommended dose.

To improve the taste of the probiotic, you can dissolve it in infant formula, milk or yogurt, a dairy alternative, lukewarm soups and apple juice. Avoid juices that are too acidic such as orange juice as these negatively impact the probiotic bacteria.

Other probiotic formulations (except Omni-Biotic HETOX) can be taken at half of one sachet per day (i.e., half of the daily recommended dose for adults).For children older than three years of age: Children above three [...] To get the most benefits from OMNi-BiOTiC®, make sure to choose the probiotic that best fits your needs. For example, if you have a history of Urinary Tract Infections (UTIs) or Yeast Infections, we recommend OMNi-BiOTiC® BALANCE. OMNi-BiOTiC® BALANCE is also a good choice if you’re looking for overall gut support and a boost to your immune system. If you are experiencing high levels of stress and/or have Irritable Bowel Syndrome (IBS) or an inflammatory bowel conditions, we recommend taking OMNi-BiOTiC® STRESS Release. And if you recently had to take medications that negatively impact your gut flora, such as antibiotics, reach for OMNi-BiOTiC® AB 10.

You can also take our product fit quiz or contact us with any questions at info@omnibioticlife.com or 914-615-9914. [...] #### Can OMNi-BiOTiC® Probiotics Be Used Post-Partum And When Breastfeeding?

Yes! Taking a probiotic supplement in the post-partum period is highly beneficial. This is a very stressful time for the mother, which often takes a toll on the body and mind.

The mother’s body is recovering from pregnancy and birth, and her hormones and immune system are re-adjusting. In addition, for many mothers, stress occurs due to the lack of sleep and constant worry about the newborn. In times of high stress, we recommend OMNi-BiOTiC® STRESS Release to support the body’s resilience and a healthy gut-brain-axis.

If you have a history of allergies, skin issues or frequent illness, then we recommend OMNi-BiOTiC® BALANCE to support your immune system during this time of transition.

## Recommended Use

1. Stir one sachet of Omni-Biotic Power in approximately 4 ounces of room temperature water or other non-acidic liquid (i.e. dairy/dairy alternative milk or yogurt, apple juice).
2. Wait 1 minute for probiotic activation.
3. Stir again and enjoy!

Omni-Biotic Power is best taken on an empty stomach, such as right after waking up or before going to sleep in the evening.

## Composition

Omni-Biotic Power contains 6 specially selected bacterial strains:

* Enterococcus faecium W54
* Lactobacillus acidophilus W22
* Lactobacillus brevis W63
* Lactococcus lactis W58
* Bifidobacterium bifidum W23
* Bifidobacterium lactis W51

Other ingredients: Corn dextrin, magnesium citrate, non-GMO corn starch, potassium chloride, blood orange aroma,\*plant protein (rice), magnesium sulphate, manganese sulphate, maltodextrin.  
   
 \*The blood orange aroma was crafted to mimic the refreshing taste of popular sports energy drinks, an innovation requested by our professional athlete partners.

Better Performance & Recovery Via the Gut

Intense physical performance can take a toll on gut health, the immune system, and overall health. When the body is pushed to its the limit through exercise, this diverts blood flow away from the gut, negatively impacting the gut flora and digestion, and weakening immune function. In addition, physical exertion increases oxidative stress, which is an imbalance of free radicals and antioxidants that leads to cell damage, as well as inflammation. When we focus on nurturing the gut, this can have a profoundly positive effect on the body’s performance, recovery, and immune function.

## FAQ

#### How Do I Know If Taking Probiotics Is A Good Idea For Me And Which Product Is The Right Fit?

Most of the time, it is a good idea to take probiotics to help maintain a healthy gut and the wellbeing of your entire body. The gut is the engine of your life; it provides fuel by digestion and influences many other vital processes within the body (i.e. the immune system, liver function and detox pathways, and stress management).

Today’s lifestyle makes it difficult to keep the gut healthy with the oversupply of processed foods, and harmful environmental, physical and psychological impacts. Probiotics ensure that good bacteria are replenished in the gut in order to strengthen the intestinal lining, and maintain a strong digestive system and overall organism. 

OMNi-BiOTiC® probiotics are uniquely designed to support different critical processes within the body. Take a look at our Product Fit Chart on our homepage to find best probiotic that best supports your body’s needs.

#### Do OMNi-BiOTiC® Products Have Regulatory Approval?

All Omni-Biotic products meet “Generally Recognized As Safe” (GRAS) criteria specified by the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA).

Our products are developed by Institut AllergoSan in accordance with the highest quality criteria for probiotics presented by the FDA, World Health Organization (WHO), World Gastroenterology Organization (WGO), and Austrian/German Societies for Probiotic Medicine (OePROM / DePROM).

#### How Long Has OMNi-BiOTiC® Been On The Market For?

OMNi-BiOTiC® was developed by Institut AllergoSan in Graz, Austria. Institut AllergoSan was founded in 1991 and launched its first probiotic supplement in 1993. Over the last 25 years, Institut AllergoSan has become an internationally recognized center for research and formulation of natural products that support the wellbeing of the body by strengthening the gut.

The OMNi-BiOTiC® product line is the #1 probiotic brand in Europe. Now, OMNi-BiOTiC® is also available in the U.S.

#### What Kind Of Testing Do You Do On OMNi-BiOTiC® Supplements?

Institut AllergoSan’s expert Research and Development team first performs lab tests on each strain of bacteria for how effective it is in achieving a specific health outcome (e.g. reducing the amount of a specific potentially harmful bacteria in your gut that could cause digestive upset). The team then tests the combination of strains of probiotic bacteria that is included in one OMNi-BiOTiC®product via clinical studies on people to make sure it works well together to achieve the desired outcome.

#### What Evidence-Based Studies Are Available For OMNi-BiOTiC® Products?

Institut AllergoSan in partnership with leading research institutions and universities continuously performs placebo controlled, double-blinded studies to test and demonstrate the clinical efficacy of OMNi-BiOTiC®multi-species probiotics. In 2009, the World Gastroenterology Organization (WGO) acclaimed a study about OMNi-BiOTiC®AB 10 (Koning 2007) as one of the 12 best studies in the world. For more information about studies on OMNi-BiOTiC®, please refer to our [Clinical Studies/OMNi-BiOTiC® Studies](https://c29aac-2.myshopify.com/pages/omni-biotic-ab-10 "https://c29aac-2.myshopify.com/pages/omni-biotic-ab-10") website section.

#### Why Are Multispecies Probiotics Preferred To Monospecies Probiotics?

The human intestine contains more than 500 different bacterial strains. A mono-species probiotic preparation contains only one single bacterial strain, whereas the multi-species probiotic preparations of OMNi-BiOTiC®contain up to as many as eleven compatible, mutually reinforcing strains. Specific combinations of bacterial strains have been scientifically shown to be especially helpful when faced with particular health challenges.

#### What’s The Benefit Of Taking A Probiotic In Powder Form?

The freeze-dried powder form of OMNi-BiOTiC® products protect the bacteria during transport and ensure that they are alive and strong when you receive the product. By reactivating the bacteria in water, it is ensured that the probiotics can navigate past your stomach, which is too acidic for the bacteria, and reach your intestine, where they will be most effective. Taking a probiotic capsule eliminates the critical step of bacterial reactivation in water for optimal strength.

#### Are OMNi-BiOTiC® Products Suitable For Vegetarians And Vegans?

Yes. OMNi-BiOTiC® products are certified vegan, lactose, gluten and soy-free, as well as Non-GMO.

#### Can I Take OMNi-BiOTiC® With Other Supplements And/Or Medications?

Yes. OMNi-BiOTiC®products contain only strains of bacteria that naturally occur in the human intestine, and no chemical agents that can interact with other supplements or medications.

#### Is It Possible To Take OMNi-BiOTiC® Despite Dietary Intolerances (I.E. Histamine, Fructose)?

OMNi-BiOTiC® probiotics are vegan, lactose-free, gluten-free, soy-free and nut-free. The probiotic powder contains different dietary fibers that serve as food for the natural, good bacteria, such as fructo-oligosaccharides and inulin. This is the food for intestinal bacteria. They are present in OMNi-BiOTiC® products only in minimal amounts, much less than is used in the clinical breath test to provoke a measurable reaction. If you extend the activation time of OMNi-BiOTiC® to 30 minutes, the bacteria almost completely metabolize their food so that, at most, only a few molecules of these substances enter your body.

For all OMNi-BiOTiC® products, only strains of bacteria are used that cannot produce histamine themselves, so OMNi-BiOTiC® products can be safely taken by people with a histamine intolerance.

#### Can I Take OMNi-BiOTiC® With Other Supplements And/Or Medications?

Yes. OMNi-BiOTiC®products contain only strains of bacteria that naturally occur in the human intestine, and no chemical agents that can interact with other supplements or medications.

#### Does The Gut First Have To Get Used To The Supply Of Good Bacteria Through OMNi-BiOTiC®?

Depending on the health of your intestinal microbiome, this may be the case. If you are experiencing severe intestinal discomfort, it is recommended that you introduce and increase your daily dose slowly over a period of several weeks (beginning with the amount of a knife-tip) to prevent possible digestive side effects. Such situations are rare and only occur in about 5% of users.

#### Is It Possible To Take Two Different OMNi-BiOTiC® Products On The Same Day?

Yes. You can easily take one OMNi-BiOTiC®in the morning and a different one in the evening. Different OMNi-BiOTiC®products should not be dissolved in the same liquid at the same time because each bacterial combination is exactly matched and supplemented with their special food in the form of a matrix.

#### Why Are There Other Ingredients In The Probiotic Powder?

The freeze-dried powder of OMNi-BiOTiC® products contains different dietary fibers that serve as food for the natural, good bacteria. This is the food for intestinal bacteria.

If you extend the activation time of OMNi-BiOTiC® to 30 minutes, the bacteria almost completely metabolize their food so that, at most, only a few molecules of these substances enter your body.

#### What Is The Recommended Intake Of OMNi-BiOTiC® Probiotics?

Stir one sachet of OMNi-BiOTiC® once or twice daily into approx. 4 oz. / 125 mL of room temperature water, wait for at least one minute (reactivation time), then stir again before drinking. OMNi-BiOTiC® intake is recommended on an empty stomach, if possible (e.g. before breakfast and/or before dinner or bedtime).

#### Do You Recommend Only Dissolving OMNi-BiOTiC® In Water?

OMNi-BiOTiC®probiotics are manufactured in the form of freeze-dried bacteria that need to be reactivated before intake. Due to its basic pH value, room temperaturewater creates the optimal environment to activate the bacteria and to energize them for their journey through your gastro-intestinal system.If you prefer, milk and milk alternatives, yogurt and yogurt alternatives, as well as tea are also well suited to rehydrate OMNi-BiOTiC®. Please note in general that the liquid in which you dissolve OMNi-BiOTiC®, should be under 100 degrees Fahrenheit, non-acidic.If the liquid is too cold, the bacteria cannot sufficiently “wake up” from their freeze-dried state. If the liquid is too hot, then they will die before you drink them. Juices and coffee are too acidic for the probiotic bacteria to survive.

#### Is It Harmful To Take Probiotics Since They Are Made Up Of Bacteria?

The human body is made up of at least equal the amount of bacteria as cells. There are many different kinds of bacteria. Some bacteria are harmful, like pathogens. The majority of bacteria in our body are responsible for keeping us alive (e.g. modulating the immune system, defending the body against pathogens). The World Health Organization (WHO) defines probiotics as “live micororganisms, which when administered in adequate amounts, confer a health benefit on the host.” Probiotics are the good bacteria that naturally occur in a healthy gut. These good bacteria colonize the lining of the digestive system and ensure that the gut flora can perform its role in vital functions in the body (e.g. food digestion and nutrient absorption, the immune system, liver function and detoxification, stress management).

#### Can OMNi-BiOTiC® Probiotics Be Used During Pregnancy And/Or When Trying To Conceive?

Yes, all OMNi-BiOTiC® probiotics are safe for use during pregnancy, post-partum, while breastfeeding and when trying to conceive. In fact, taking a high-quality probiotic supplement, like OMNi-BiOTiC®, during pregnancy and the first few months after birth will help support a healthy pregnancy and help lay the foundation for the newborn’s health.

Probiotics are the good bacteria that naturally occur in your gut. They are essential for good digestion, nutrient absorption, vaginal health, immune function, and even cognitive processes including mood.

To get the most benefits from OMNi-BiOTiC®, make sure to choose the probiotic that best fits your needs. For example, if you have a history of Urinary Tract Infections (UTIs) or Yeast Infections, we recommend OMNi-BiOTiC® BALANCE. OMNi-BiOTiC® BALANCE is also a good choice if you’re looking for overall gut support and a boost to your immune system. If you are experiencing high levels of stress and/or have Irritable Bowel Syndrome (IBS) or an inflammatory bowel conditions, we recommend taking OMNi-BiOTiC® STRESS Release. And if you recently had to take medications that negatively impact your gut flora, such as antibiotics, reach for OMNi-BiOTiC® AB 10.

You can also take our product fit quiz or contact us with any questions at [info@omnibioticlife.com](mailto:info@omnibioticlife.com) or 914-615-9914.

#### Can OMNi-BiOTiC® Probiotics Be Used Post-Partum And When Breastfeeding?

Yes! Taking a probiotic supplement in the post-partum period is highly beneficial. This is a very stressful time for the mother, which often takes a toll on the body and mind.

The mother’s body is recovering from pregnancy and birth, and her hormones and immune system are re-adjusting. In addition, for many mothers, stress occurs due to the lack of sleep and constant worry about the newborn. In times of high stress, we recommend OMNi-BiOTiC® STRESS Release to support the body’s resilience and a healthy gut-brain-axis.

If you have a history of allergies, skin issues or frequent illness, then we recommend OMNi-BiOTiC® BALANCE to support your immune system during this time of transition.

Furthermore, a newborn baby starts developing their gut microbiome the day they are born. Over the course of the first 12 months, a baby forms the basis of their gut microbiome, which will stay with them for the rest of their life. The type of delivery, food, supplement and medication intake from the mother while breastfeeding all influence how the baby’s microbiome forms. The makeup of the microbiome in the first year after birth will influence a person’s health and wellbeing throughout their life. Therefore, taking a probiotic supplement will also greatly benefit the newborn baby in addition to the mother.

For example, research shows that children who consistently receive probiotics via breast milk, solid food, or supplements in the first few years after birth are less likely to develop seasonal and food allergies, intolerances, as well as chronic skin issues like eczema and atopic dermatitis.

#### Are OMNi-BiOTiC® Probiotics Safe For Children?

Yes, most OMNi-BiOTiC® probiotics are safe for children.**For babies and up to one year of age**: Omni-Biotic Panda was specifically developed for babies and young children to support the healthy development of the baby’s gut microbiome, digestive system, and immune function. It has also been shown in clinical studies to improve symptoms of infant colic and to reduce the risk of childhood allergies, such as eczema.**For children between one and three years of age**: If the child is benefiting from Omni-Biotic Panda, this is often a good choice to continue until three years of age. Other probiotic formulations (except Omni-Biotic HETOX) can be taken at half of one sachet per day (i.e., half of the daily recommended dose for adults).**For children older than three years of age**: Children above three years of age typically respond well to taking the regular daily recommended dose. To improve the taste of the probiotic, you can dissolve it in infant formula, milk or yogurt, a dairy alternative, lukewarm soups and apple juice. Avoid juices that are too acidic such as orange juice as these negatively impact the probiotic bacteria.

## Recommended Use

1. Stir one sachet of Omni-Biotic Power in approximately 4 ounces of room temperature water or other non-acidic liquid (i.e. dairy/dairy alternative milk or yogurt, apple juice).
2. Wait 1 minute for probiotic activation.
3. Stir again and enjoy!

Omni-Biotic Power is best taken on an empty stomach, such as right after waking up or before going to sleep in the evening.

## Composition

Omni-Biotic Power contains 6 specially selected bacterial strains:

* Enterococcus faecium W54
* Lactobacillus acidophilus W22
* Lactobacillus brevis W63
* Lactococcus lactis W58
* Bifidobacterium bifidum W23
* Bifidobacterium lactis W51

Other ingredients: Corn dextrin, magnesium citrate, non-GMO corn starch, potassium chloride, blood orange aroma,\*plant protein (rice), magnesium sulphate, manganese sulphate, maltodextrin.  
   
 \*The blood orange aroma was crafted to mimic the refreshing taste of popular sports energy drinks, an innovation requested by our professional athlete partners.

Better Performance & Recovery Via the Gut

Intense physical performance can take a toll on gut health, the immune system, and overall health. When the body is pushed to its the limit through exercise, this diverts blood flow away from the gut, negatively impacting the gut flora and digestion, and weakening immune function. In addition, physical exertion increases oxidative stress, which is an imbalance of free radicals and antioxidants that leads to cell damage, as well as inflammation. When we focus on nurturing the gut, this can have a profoundly positive effect on the body’s performance, recovery, and immune function.

## FAQ

#### How Do I Know If Taking Probiotics Is A Good Idea For Me And Which Product Is The Right Fit?

Most of the time, it is a good idea to take probiotics to help maintain a healthy gut and the wellbeing of your entire body. The gut is the engine of your life; it provides fuel by digestion and influences many other vital processes within the body (i.e. the immune system, liver function and detox pathways, and stress management).

Today’s lifestyle makes it difficult to keep the gut healthy with the oversupply of processed foods, and harmful environmental, physical and psychological impacts. Probiotics ensure that good bacteria are replenished in the gut in order to strengthen the intestinal lining, and maintain a strong digestive system and overall organism. 

OMNi-BiOTiC® probiotics are uniquely designed to support different critical processes within the body. Take a look at our Product Fit Chart on our homepage to find best probiotic that best supports your body’s needs.

#### Do OMNi-BiOTiC® Products Have Regulatory Approval?

All Omni-Biotic products meet “Generally Recognized As Safe” (GRAS) criteria specified by the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA).

Our products are developed by Institut AllergoSan in accordance with the highest quality criteria for probiotics presented by the FDA, World Health Organization (WHO), World Gastroenterology Organization (WGO), and Austrian/German Societies for Probiotic Medicine (OePROM / DePROM).

#### How Long Has OMNi-BiOTiC® Been On The Market For?

OMNi-BiOTiC® was developed by Institut AllergoSan in Graz, Austria. Institut AllergoSan was founded in 1991 and launched its first probiotic supplement in 1993. Over the last 25 years, Institut AllergoSan has become an internationally recognized center for research and formulation of natural products that support the wellbeing of the body by strengthening the gut.

The OMNi-BiOTiC® product line is the #1 probiotic brand in Europe. Now, OMNi-BiOTiC® is also available in the U.S.

#### What Kind Of Testing Do You Do On OMNi-BiOTiC® Supplements?

Institut AllergoSan’s expert Research and Development team first performs lab tests on each strain of bacteria for how effective it is in achieving a specific health outcome (e.g. reducing the amount of a specific potentially harmful bacteria in your gut that could cause digestive upset). The team then tests the combination of strains of probiotic bacteria that is included in one OMNi-BiOTiC®product via clinical studies on people to make sure it works well together to achieve the desired outcome.

#### What Evidence-Based Studies Are Available For OMNi-BiOTiC® Products?

Institut AllergoSan in partnership with leading research institutions and universities continuously performs placebo controlled, double-blinded studies to test and demonstrate the clinical efficacy of OMNi-BiOTiC®multi-species probiotics. In 2009, the World Gastroenterology Organization (WGO) acclaimed a study about OMNi-BiOTiC®AB 10 (Koning 2007) as one of the 12 best studies in the world. For more information about studies on OMNi-BiOTiC®, please refer to our [Clinical Studies/OMNi-BiOTiC® Studies](https://c29aac-2.myshopify.com/pages/omni-biotic-ab-10 "https://c29aac-2.myshopify.com/pages/omni-biotic-ab-10") website section.

#### Why Are Multispecies Probiotics Preferred To Monospecies Probiotics?

The human intestine contains more than 500 different bacterial strains. A mono-species probiotic preparation contains only one single bacterial strain, whereas the multi-species probiotic preparations of OMNi-BiOTiC®contain up to as many as eleven compatible, mutually reinforcing strains. Specific combinations of bacterial strains have been scientifically shown to be especially helpful when faced with particular health challenges.

#### What’s The Benefit Of Taking A Probiotic In Powder Form?

The freeze-dried powder form of OMNi-BiOTiC® products protect the bacteria during transport and ensure that they are alive and strong when you receive the product. By reactivating the bacteria in water, it is ensured that the probiotics can navigate past your stomach, which is too acidic for the bacteria, and reach your intestine, where they will be most effective. Taking a probiotic capsule eliminates the critical step of bacterial reactivation in water for optimal strength.

#### Are OMNi-BiOTiC® Products Suitable For Vegetarians And Vegans?

Yes. OMNi-BiOTiC® products are certified vegan, lactose, gluten and soy-free, as well as Non-GMO.

#### Can I Take OMNi-BiOTiC® With Other Supplements And/Or Medications?

Yes. OMNi-BiOTiC®products contain only strains of bacteria that naturally occur in the human intestine, and no chemical agents that can interact with other supplements or medications.

#### Is It Possible To Take OMNi-BiOTiC® Despite Dietary Intolerances (I.E. Histamine, Fructose)?

OMNi-BiOTiC® probiotics are vegan, lactose-free, gluten-free, soy-free and nut-free. The probiotic powder contains different dietary fibers that serve as food for the natural, good bacteria, such as fructo-oligosaccharides and inulin. This is the food for intestinal bacteria. They are present in OMNi-BiOTiC® products only in minimal amounts, much less than is used in the clinical breath test to provoke a measurable reaction. If you extend the activation time of OMNi-BiOTiC® to 30 minutes, the bacteria almost completely metabolize their food so that, at most, only a few molecules of these substances enter your body.

For all OMNi-BiOTiC® products, only strains of bacteria are used that cannot produce histamine themselves, so OMNi-BiOTiC® products can be safely taken by people with a histamine intolerance.

#### Can I Take OMNi-BiOTiC® With Other Supplements And/Or Medications?

Yes. OMNi-BiOTiC®products contain only strains of bacteria that naturally occur in the human intestine, and no chemical agents that can interact with other supplements or medications.

#### Does The Gut First Have To Get Used To The Supply Of Good Bacteria Through OMNi-BiOTiC®?

Depending on the health of your intestinal microbiome, this may be the case. If you are experiencing severe intestinal discomfort, it is recommended that you introduce and increase your daily dose slowly over a period of several weeks (beginning with the amount of a knife-tip) to prevent possible digestive side effects. Such situations are rare and only occur in about 5% of users.

#### Is It Possible To Take Two Different OMNi-BiOTiC® Products On The Same Day?

Yes. You can easily take one OMNi-BiOTiC®in the morning and a different one in the evening. Different OMNi-BiOTiC®products should not be dissolved in the same liquid at the same time because each bacterial combination is exactly matched and supplemented with their special food in the form of a matrix.

#### Why Are There Other Ingredients In The Probiotic Powder?

The freeze-dried powder of OMNi-BiOTiC® products contains different dietary fibers that serve as food for the natural, good bacteria. This is the food for intestinal bacteria.

If you extend the activation time of OMNi-BiOTiC® to 30 minutes, the bacteria almost completely metabolize their food so that, at most, only a few molecules of these substances enter your body.

#### What Is The Recommended Intake Of OMNi-BiOTiC® Probiotics?

Stir one sachet of OMNi-BiOTiC® once or twice daily into approx. 4 oz. / 125 mL of room temperature water, wait for at least one minute (reactivation time), then stir again before drinking. OMNi-BiOTiC® intake is recommended on an empty stomach, if possible (e.g. before breakfast and/or before dinner or bedtime).

#### Do You Recommend Only Dissolving OMNi-BiOTiC® In Water?

OMNi-BiOTiC®probiotics are manufactured in the form of freeze-dried bacteria that need to be reactivated before intake. Due to its basic pH value, room temperaturewater creates the optimal environment to activate the bacteria and to energize them for their journey through your gastro-intestinal system.If you prefer, milk and milk alternatives, yogurt and yogurt alternatives, as well as tea are also well suited to rehydrate OMNi-BiOTiC®. Please note in general that the liquid in which you dissolve OMNi-BiOTiC®, should be under 100 degrees Fahrenheit, non-acidic.If the liquid is too cold, the bacteria cannot sufficiently “wake up” from their freeze-dried state. If the liquid is too hot, then they will die before you drink them. Juices and coffee are too acidic for the probiotic bacteria to survive.

#### Is It Harmful To Take Probiotics Since They Are Made Up Of Bacteria?

The human body is made up of at least equal the amount of bacteria as cells. There are many different kinds of bacteria. Some bacteria are harmful, like pathogens. The majority of bacteria in our body are responsible for keeping us alive (e.g. modulating the immune system, defending the body against pathogens). The World Health Organization (WHO) defines probiotics as “live micororganisms, which when administered in adequate amounts, confer a health benefit on the host.” Probiotics are the good bacteria that naturally occur in a healthy gut. These good bacteria colonize the lining of the digestive system and ensure that the gut flora can perform its role in vital functions in the body (e.g. food digestion and nutrient absorption, the immune system, liver function and detoxification, stress management).

#### Can OMNi-BiOTiC® Probiotics Be Used During Pregnancy And/Or When Trying To Conceive?

Yes, all OMNi-BiOTiC® probiotics are safe for use during pregnancy, post-partum, while breastfeeding and when trying to conceive. In fact, taking a high-quality probiotic supplement, like OMNi-BiOTiC®, during pregnancy and the first few months after birth will help support a healthy pregnancy and help lay the foundation for the newborn’s health.

Probiotics are the good bacteria that naturally occur in your gut. They are essential for good digestion, nutrient absorption, vaginal health, immune function, and even cognitive processes including mood.

To get the most benefits from OMNi-BiOTiC®, make sure to choose the probiotic that best fits your needs. For example, if you have a history of Urinary Tract Infections (UTIs) or Yeast Infections, we recommend OMNi-BiOTiC® BALANCE. OMNi-BiOTiC® BALANCE is also a good choice if you’re looking for overall gut support and a boost to your immune system. If you are experiencing high levels of stress and/or have Irritable Bowel Syndrome (IBS) or an inflammatory bowel conditions, we recommend taking OMNi-BiOTiC® STRESS Release. And if you recently had to take medications that negatively impact your gut flora, such as antibiotics, reach for OMNi-BiOTiC® AB 10.

You can also take our product fit quiz or contact us with any questions at [info@omnibioticlife.com](mailto:info@omnibioticlife.com) or 914-615-9914.

#### Can OMNi-BiOTiC® Probiotics Be Used Post-Partum And When Breastfeeding?

Yes! Taking a probiotic supplement in the post-partum period is highly beneficial. This is a very stressful time for the mother, which often takes a toll on the body and mind.

The mother’s body is recovering from pregnancy and birth, and her hormones and immune system are re-adjusting. In addition, for many mothers, stress occurs due to the lack of sleep and constant worry about the newborn. In times of high stress, we recommend OMNi-BiOTiC® STRESS Release to support the body’s resilience and a healthy gut-brain-axis.

If you have a history of allergies, skin issues or frequent illness, then we recommend OMNi-BiOTiC® BALANCE to support your immune system during this time of transition.

Furthermore, a newborn baby starts developing their gut microbiome the day they are born. Over the course of the first 12 months, a baby forms the basis of their gut microbiome, which will stay with them for the rest of their life. The type of delivery, food, supplement and medication intake from the mother while breastfeeding all influence how the baby’s microbiome forms. The makeup of the microbiome in the first year after birth will influence a person’s health and wellbeing throughout their life. Therefore, taking a probiotic supplement will also greatly benefit the newborn baby in addition to the mother.

For example, research shows that children who consistently receive probiotics via breast milk, solid food, or supplements in the first few years after birth are less likely to develop seasonal and food allergies, intolerances, as well as chronic skin issues like eczema and atopic dermatitis.

#### Are OMNi-BiOTiC® Probiotics Safe For Children?

Yes, most OMNi-BiOTiC® probiotics are safe for children.**For babies and up to one year of age**: Omni-Biotic Panda was specifically developed for babies and young children to support the healthy development of the baby’s gut microbiome, digestive system, and immune function. It has also been shown in clinical studies to improve symptoms of infant colic and to reduce the risk of childhood allergies, such as eczema.**For children between one and three years of age**: If the child is benefiting from Omni-Biotic Panda, this is often a good choice to continue until three years of age. Other probiotic formulations (except Omni-Biotic HETOX) can be taken at half of one sachet per day (i.e., half of the daily recommended dose for adults).**For children older than three years of age**: Children above three years of age typically respond well to taking the regular daily recommended dose. To improve the taste of the probiotic, you can dissolve it in infant formula, milk or yogurt, a dairy alternative, lukewarm soups and apple juice. Avoid juices that are too acidic such as orange juice as these negatively impact the probiotic bacteria.

## Benefits

* Supports healthy immune function and response
* Balances healthy inflammatory response and allergen management
* Optimizes digestive function and comfort, alleviating occasional constipation and bloating
* Supports healthy balance of yeast and beneficial bacteria in the gut, maintaining healthy levels of Candida

## Recommended Use

1. Stir one sachet of Omni-Biotic Balance in approximately 4 ounces of room temperature water or other non-acidic liquid (i.e. dairy/dairy alternative milk or yogurt, apple juice).
2. Wait 1 minute for probiotic activation.
3. Stir again and enjoy!

Take one sachet daily or as directed by your healthcare practitioner. Omni-Biotic Balance is best consumed on an empty stomach, for example right after waking up in the morning or before going to bed in the evening.

## Composition

Omni-Biotic Balance contains six specially selected, scientifically tested, well-characterized bacterial strains:

* *Bifidobacterium animalis W53*
* *Lactobacillus acidophilus W55*
* *Lactobacillus salivarius W57*
* *Enterococcus faecium W54*
* *Lactococcus lactis W58*
* *Lactobacillus casei W56*

Other ingredients: Non-GMO corn starch, maltodextrin, fructo-oligosaccharides (FOS), inulin, polydextrose, potassium chloride, plant protein (rice), magnesium sulfate, amylase, manganese sulfate

## FAQ

#### How Should I Best Take Omni-Biotic Balance?

For Omni-Biotic Balance probiotic, please follow these intake instructions:

1. Stir one sachet of Omni-Biotic Balance in approximately 4 ounces/125 mL of room temperature water or other non-acidic liquid (dairy and non-dairy milk, dairy and non-dairy yogurt, apple juice).
2. Wait 1 minute for probiotic reconstitution/activation.
3. Stir again and enjoy!

Take one or two sachets daily, or as directed by your healthcare practitioner. Omni-Biotic Balance is best consumed on an empty stomach, for example right after waking up or before doing to bed in the evening.

#### Can I Mix Omni-Biotic Balance Into Anything Other Than Water?

Yes. Omni-Biotic probiotics can also be mixed into non-acidic liquids such as apple juice, milk or yogurt (or non-dairy alternatives), apple sauce and lukewarm soups. Acidic beverages such as coffee, tea and orange juice should be avoided. Also, do not exceed 104 degrees Fahrenheit as this can kill the probiotics.

#### Can I Take Omni-Biotic Balance More Than Once Daily?

Yes, Omni-Biotic Balance can be taken twice daily, especially if you are experiencing constipation, bloating and / or gas. For maintenance and general gut support, taking Omni-Biotic Balance once daily is typically sufficient.

#### Can I Take Omni-Biotic Balance On An Empty Stomach, Or Should I Take The Probiotic With Food / A Meal?

All Omni-Biotic probiotics are best taken on an empty stomach. This helps the probiotic bacteria move through the acidic environment of the stomach as quickly as possible, and they reach their destination in the intestines alive and metabolically active.

#### Can I Take Omni-Biotic Balance With Other Supplements And / Or Medications?

Yes. Omni-Biotic probiotics contain only strains of bacteria that naturally occur in the human intestine, and no chemical agents that can interact with other supplements or medications.

#### What Are The Probiotic Strains Included In Omni-Biotic Balance?

Omni-Biotic Balance contains six specially selected, scientifically tested, well-characterized probiotic strains:

* Bifidobacterium animalis W53
* Lactobacillus acidophilus W55
* Lactobacillus salivarius W57
* Enterococcus faecium W54
* Lactococcus lactis W58
* Lactobacillus casei W56

#### Why Are There Other Ingredients In Addition To The Probiotics In Omni-Biotic Balance?

The other ingredients included in Omni-Biotic Balance are: Non-GMO corn starch, maltodextrin, fructo-oligosaccharides (FOS), inulin, polydextrose, potassium chloride, rice protein, magnesium, sulphate, enzymes (amylases), manganese sulphate.

These ingredients are specifically added to improve the delivery of the probiotic bacteria to the intestines. A small amount of corn starch serves as the carrier. The other ingredients are a mix of prebiotic nutrients that serve as the food for the probiotics. When the powder is dissolved in water, the probiotics can hydrate and consume these specialized nutrients, and become strong for their passage through the digestive tract to the intestines where they will be most effective.

#### How Many Colony Forming Units (CFU) Are In Omni-Biotic Balance?

Omni-Biotic Balance contains 2 billion CFU per serving/sachet.

#### How Many Servings Are In One Box Of Omni-Biotic Balance?

One box of Omni-Biotic Balance includes 28 servings. This probiotic is shelf stable through the expiration date at room temperature.

#### How Does Omni-Biotic Balance Help Support The Immune System?

70 to 80% of the body’s immune cells are located in the intestines. The gastrointestinal tract provides one of the body’s first lines of defense for anything that enters the body via the mouth. Our good gut bacteria play an important role in keeping the gut balanced so that the immune system can work properly.

Certain probiotic bacteria help in the production of immunoglobulins, such as Secretory Immunoglobulin A (SIgA), which is important for immune function.

Furthermore, an imbalance in our gut bacteria can lead to inflammation in the gut and result in leaky gut. As a result, unwanted substance leak from the intestines into the blood stream, triggering an immune response. If this persists, the immune system goes into overdrive, which is associated with chronic inflammation, chronic fatigue, inflammatory conditions throughout the body and the rise of intolerances and allergies.

#### Does Omni-Biotic Balance Help Manage Occasional Constipation, Bloating And / Or Gas?

Yes. Omni-Biotic Balance contains six essential bacteria strains that optimize digestion. The probiotic bacteria included in Omni-Biotic Balance balance the pH in the intestines and increase mucous production, which helps regulate bowel movements in times of occasional constipation. Omni-Biotic Balance also promotes a healthy balance of bacteria and yeast in the gut flora, which helps alleviate bloating and gas.

#### Do I Have To Refrigerate This Probiotic?

No, Omni-Biotic Balance does not need to be refrigerated.

#### Do Omni-Biotic Probiotics Have Regulatory Approval?

All Omni-Biotic products meet “Generally Recognized As Safe” (GRAS) criteria specified by the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA).

Our products are developed by Institut AllergoSan in accordance with the highest quality criteria for probiotics presented by the FDA, World Health Organization (WHO), World Gastroenterology Organization (WGO), and Austrian/German Societies for Probiotic Medicine (OePROM / DePROM).

#### What Kind Of Testing Do You Do On Omni-Biotic Probiotics?

Omni-Biotic probiotics are developed by Institut AllergoSan “Competence Center for Microbiome Research,” based on over 25 years of gut microbiome research and 100+ clinical studies using our products.

Each strain of probiotic bacteria for how effective it is in achieving a specific health outcome. The team then tests the combination of strains that is included in one Omni-Biotic probiotic to make sure they work well together to achieve a desired outcome. All Omni-Biotic probiotics are tested for efficacy in their final version in clinical studies.

Key clinical studies using Omni-Biotic can be found in the [Research / Education website section](https://c29aac-2.myshopify.com/pages/gut-immunity-connection "https://c29aac-2.myshopify.com/pages/gut-immunity-connection").

#### Where Can I Find The Clinical Studies That Test Omni-Biotic Balance?

You can find the clinical studies using Omni-Biotic Balance [here](https://c29aac-2.myshopify.com/pages/gut-immunity-connection "https://c29aac-2.myshopify.com/pages/gut-immunity-connection").

#### Are Omni-Biotic Probiotics Suitable For Vegetarians And Vegans?

All Omni-Biotic probiotics available on omnibioticlife.com are vegan, lactose, gluten, and soy-free, and made up of non-GMO ingredients.

#### Can Omni-Biotic Be Used When Trying To Conceive, During Pregnancy, Postpartum And While Breastfeeding?

Yes, all Omni-Biotic probiotics are safe for use when trying to conceive, during pregnancy, postpartum and while breastfeeding.

In fact, supporting gut health via probiotics and prebiotics during pregnancy and the first few months after birth will help support a healthy pregnancy and lay the foundation for the infant’s health. Check out our prenatal and infant probiotic [here](https://c29aac-2.myshopify.com/pages/gut-maternal-neonatal "https://c29aac-2.myshopify.com/pages/gut-maternal-neonatal").

#### Are Omni-Biotic Probiotics Safe For Children?

Yes, most OMNi-BiOTiC® probiotics are safe for children.

**For babies and up to one year of age**: Omni-Biotic Panda was specifically developed for babies and young children to support the healthy development of the baby’s gut microbiome, digestive system, and immune function. It has also been shown in clinical studies to improve symptoms of infant colic and to reduce the risk of childhood allergies, such as eczema.

**For children between one and three years of age**: If the child is benefiting from Omni-Biotic Panda, this is often a good choice to continue until three years of age. Other probiotic formulations (except Omni-Biotic HETOX) can be taken at half of one sachet per day (i.e., half of the daily recommended dose for adults).

**For children older than three years of age**: Children above three years of age typically respond well to taking the regular daily recommended dose.

To improve the taste of the probiotic, you can dissolve it in infant formula, milk or yogurt, a dairy alternative, lukewarm soups and apple juice. Avoid juices that are too acidic such as orange juice as these negatively impact the probiotic bacteria.

results.title: Omni-Biotic AB 10 Probiotic
results.content:
#### Are Omni-Biotic Probiotics Safe For Children?

Yes, most OMNi-BiOTiC® probiotics are safe for children.

For babies and up to one year of age: Omni-Biotic Panda was specifically developed for babies and young children to support the healthy development of the baby’s gut microbiome, digestive system, and immune function. It has also been shown in clinical studies to improve symptoms of infant colic and to reduce the risk of childhood allergies, such as eczema.

For children between one and three years of age: If the child is benefiting from Omni-Biotic Panda, this is often a good choice to continue until three years of age. Other probiotic formulations (except Omni-Biotic HETOX) can be taken at half of one sachet per day (i.e., half of the daily recommended dose for adults). [...] For children older than three years of age: Children above three years of age typically respond well to taking the regular daily recommended dose.

To improve the taste of the probiotic, you can dissolve it in infant formula, milk or yogurt, a dairy alternative, lukewarm soups and apple juice. Avoid juices that are too acidic such as orange juice as these negatively impact the probiotic bacteria.

## Customer Reviews

This saved me!!! Unfortunately, I had to take antibiotics on and off for few months and I was uncomfortably bloated and I knew my gut needed some support. I have recommended this product to all my friends and family!!

I take Omni Biotic each morning on an empty stomach. The taste is mild and the individual packets make it easy to travel with. 10/10 recommend. [...] ## Recommended Use

Take one sachet daily or as directed by your healthcare practitioner. Omni-Biotic AB 10 is best consumed on an empty stomach, for example right after waking up in the morning or before going to bed in the evening.  
  
During antibiotic treatment, wait at least one hour before and after taking your antibiotic before you take your probiotic.

## Composition

Omni-Biotic AB 10 contains ten specially selected, scientifically tested, well-characterized bacterial strains:

Other ingredients: Non-GMO corn starch, maltodextrin, inulin, potassium chloride, plant protein (rice), magnesium sulfate, fructooligosaccharides (FOS), amylase, vanilla flavoring, manganese sulfate.

## Shipping & Returns

Free shipping for orders over $100. FedEx 2-day shipping for regular orders.

###### [Should Antibiotics and Probiotics be taken together?](/blogs/blog/should-probiotics-antibiotics-taken-together)

## FAQ

#### How Should I Best Take Omni-Biotic AB 10?

For Omni-Biotic AB 10 probiotic, please follow these intake instructions:

Take one sachet daily or as directed by your healthcare practitioner. In acute situations, such as during antibiotic treatment, you can take two sachets daily. Omni-Biotic AB 10 is best consumed on an empty stomach, for example right after waking up or before doing to bed in the evening.

Tip: During antibiotic treatment, wait at least one hour before and after taking your antibiotic before you take your probiotic.

#### Can I Mix Omni-Biotic AB 10 Into Anything Other Than Water?

Yes. Omni-Biotic probiotics can also be mixed into non-acidic liquids such as apple juice, milk or yogurt (or non-dairy alternatives), apple sauce and lukewarm soup. Acidic beverages such as coffee, tea and orange juice should be avoided. Also, do not exceed 104 degrees Fahrenheit as this can kill the probiotics.

#### Can I Take Omni-Biotic AB 10 More Than Once Daily?

Yes. Omni-Biotic AB 10 can be taken twice daily, especially if you are experiencing diarrhea / loose stool due to short-term medication intake such as antibiotics. For maintenance and general gut support, taking Omni-Biotic AB 10 once daily is typically sufficient.

#### Can I Take Omni-Biotic AB 10 On An Empty Stomach, Or Should I Take The Probiotic With Food / A Meal?

Yes. All Omni-Biotic probiotics are best taken on an empty stomach. This helps the probiotic bacteria move through the acidic environment of the stomach as quickly as possible and they reach their destination in the intestines alive and metabolically active.

#### Can I Take Omni-Biotic AB 10 With Other Supplements And / Or Medications?

Yes. Omni-Biotic probiotics contain only strains of bacteria that naturally occur in the human intestine, and no chemical agents that can interact with other supplements or medications.

Please note, when taking antibiotics, it is recommended to take Omni-Biotic AB 10 at least one (1) hour away from the antibiotic for optimal efficacy.

#### If I Take Antibiotics, Can I Take Omni-Biotic AB 10 At The Same Time?

Taking Omni-Biotic AB 10 during antibiotic treatment is very beneficial. Timing is important though. When taking antibiotics, it is recommended to take Omni-Biotic AB 10 at least one (1) hour away from the antibiotic for optimal efficacy.

#### What Are The Probiotic Strains Included In Omni-Biotic AB 10?

Omni-Biotic AB 10 contains ten specially selected, scientifically tested, well-characterized probiotic strains:

Lactobacillus acidophilus W55  
Lactobacillus salivarius W24  
Lactobacillus acidophilus W37  
Lactobacillus plantarum W62  
Lactobacillus paracasei W72  
Bifidobacterium bifidum W23  
Lactobacillus rhamnosus W71  
Bifidobacterium lactis W18  
Enterococcus faecium W54  
Bifidobacterium longum W51

#### Why Are There Other Ingredients In Addition To The Probiotics In Omni-Biotic AB 10?

The other ingredients included in Omni-Biotic AB 10 are: Non-GMO corn starch, maltodextrin, inulin, potassium chloride, rice protein, magnesium sulphate, fructo-oligosaccharides (FOS), enzymes (amylases), vanilla flavoring, manganese sulphate.

These ingredients are specifically added to improve the delivery of the probiotic bacteria to the intestines. A small amount of corn starch serves as the carrier. The other ingredients are a mix of prebiotic nutrients that serve as the food for the probiotics. When the powder is dissolved in water, the probiotics can hydrate and consume these specialized nutrients, and become strong for their passage through the digestive tract to the intestines where they will be most effective.

#### How Many Colony Forming Units (CFU) Are In Omni-Biotic AB 10?

Omni-Biotic AB 10 contains 5 billion CFU per serving/sachet.

#### How Many Servings Are In One Box Of Omni-Biotic AB 10?

One box of Omni-Biotic AB 10 includes 30 servings. This probiotic is shelf stable through the expiration date at room temperature.

#### Do I Have To Refrigerate This Probiotic?

No, Omni-Biotic AB 10 does not need to be refrigerated.

#### Do Omni-Biotic Probiotics Have Regulatory Approval?

All Omni-Biotic products meet “Generally Recognized As Safe” (GRAS) criteria specified by the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA).

Our products are developed by Institut AllergoSan in accordance with the highest quality criteria for probiotics presented by the FDA, World Health Organization (WHO), World Gastroenterology Organization (WGO), and Austrian/German Societies for Probiotic Medicine (OePROM / DePROM).

#### What Kind Of Testing Do You Do On Omni-Biotic Probiotics?

Omni-Biotic probiotics are developed by Institut AllergoSan “Competence Center for Microbiome Research,” based on over 25 years of gut microbiome research and 100+ clinical studies using our products.

Each strain of probiotic bacteria for how effective it is in achieving a specific health outcome. The team then tests the combination of strains that is included in one Omni-Biotic probiotic to make sure they work well together to achieve a desired outcome. All Omni-Biotic probiotics are tested for efficacy in their final version in clinical studies.

Key clinical studies using Omni-Biotic can be found in the Research / Education website section.

#### Where Can I Find The Clinical Studies That Test Omni-Biotic AB 10 For Antibiotic-Associated Diarrhea And Clostridium Difficile (C.Diff)?

You can find the clinical studies using Omni-Biotic AB 10 [here](https://c29aac-2.myshopify.com/pages/gut-antibiotic-impact "https://c29aac-2.myshopify.com/pages/gut-antibiotic-impact").

#### Are Omni-Biotic Probiotics Suitable For Vegetarians And Vegans?

All Omni-Biotic probiotics available on[omnibioticlife.com](http://www.omnibioticlife.com/) are vegan, lactose, gluten, and soy-free, and made up of non-GMO ingredients.

#### Can Omni-Biotic Be Used When Trying To Conceive, During Pregnancy, Postpartum And While Breastfeeding?

Yes, all Omni-Biotic probiotics are safe for use when trying to conceive, during pregnancy, postpartum and while breastfeeding.

In fact, supporting gut health via probiotics and prebiotics during pregnancy and the first few months after birth will help support a healthy pregnancy and lay the foundation for the infant’s health. Check out our prenatal and infant probiotic [here](/pages/prenatal-baby "Prenatal & Baby").

#### Are Omni-Biotic Probiotics Safe For Children?

Yes, most OMNi-BiOTiC® probiotics are safe for children.

**For babies and up to one year of age**: Omni-Biotic Panda was specifically developed for babies and young children to support the healthy development of the baby’s gut microbiome, digestive system, and immune function. It has also been shown in clinical studies to improve symptoms of infant colic and to reduce the risk of childhood allergies, such as eczema.

**For children between one and three years of age**: If the child is benefiting from Omni-Biotic Panda, this is often a good choice to continue until three years of age. Other probiotic formulations (except Omni-Biotic HETOX) can be taken at half of one sachet per day (i.e., half of the daily recommended dose for adults).

**For children older than three years of age**: Children above three years of age typically respond well to taking the regular daily recommended dose.

To improve the taste of the probiotic, you can dissolve it in infant formula, milk or yogurt, a dairy alternative, lukewarm soups and apple juice. Avoid juices that are too acidic such as orange juice as these negatively impact the probiotic bacteria.

## Customer Reviews

This saved me!!! Unfortunately, I had to take antibiotics on and off for few months and I was uncomfortably bloated and I knew my gut needed some support. I have recommended this product to all my friends and family!!

I take Omni Biotic each morning on an empty stomach. The taste is mild and the individual packets make it easy to travel with. 10/10 recommend.

I have been taking this probiotic for 4 months now. I am so pleased with it! My digestion is great, bowel movements are consistent and easy. It did take a few days for me to get used to the taste. It’s extremely mild but a different kind of taste. Overall I am very happy with it and plan to continue taking it!

I had to receive multiple antibiotics due to a pregnancy complication and my gut was wrecked. I ordered these probiotics while sitting on the toilet because I was desperate. It made a difference within about 3 days. I will definitely remain on this probiotic over the next couple months to try to build back a healthy gut! Definitely expensive, but well worth it, especially when taking antibiotics. Plus, the taste is not bad at all!

These probiotics are amazing. I’ve been on antibiotics for almost a month now and Omni-biotic has saved me. No secondary yeast infections and my gut feels good.

Gut Disruption & Effective Restoration

Certain medications, environmental factors, and dietary habits can deplete the gut microbiome and create opportunity for pathogens to overgrow. These bad bacteria, viruses or yeasts can easily disrupt the balance and function of the gut microbiome, leading to digestive issues and secondary infections. A restorative probiotic will replenish the gut flora, reduce digestive issues, and fortify your body against other health challenges.
