###### [Should Antibiotics and Probiotics be taken together?](/blogs/blog/should-probiotics-antibiotics-taken-together)

## FAQ

#### How Should I Best Take Omni-Biotic AB 10?

For Omni-Biotic AB 10 probiotic, please follow these intake instructions:

Take one sachet daily or as directed by your healthcare practitioner. In acute situations, such as during antibiotic treatment, you can take two sachets daily. Omni-Biotic AB 10 is best consumed on an empty stomach, for example right after waking up or before doing to bed in the evening.

Tip: During antibiotic treatment, wait at least one hour before and after taking your antibiotic before you take your probiotic.

#### Can I Mix Omni-Biotic AB 10 Into Anything Other Than Water?

Yes. Omni-Biotic probiotics can also be mixed into non-acidic liquids such as apple juice, milk or yogurt (or non-dairy alternatives), apple sauce and lukewarm soup. Acidic beverages such as coffee, tea and orange juice should be avoided. Also, do not exceed 104 degrees Fahrenheit as this can kill the probiotics.

#### Can I Take Omni-Biotic AB 10 More Than Once Daily?

Yes. Omni-Biotic AB 10 can be taken twice daily, especially if you are experiencing diarrhea / loose stool due to short-term medication intake such as antibiotics. For maintenance and general gut support, taking Omni-Biotic AB 10 once daily is typically sufficient.

#### Can I Take Omni-Biotic AB 10 On An Empty Stomach, Or Should I Take The Probiotic With Food / A Meal?

Yes. All Omni-Biotic probiotics are best taken on an empty stomach. This helps the probiotic bacteria move through the acidic environment of the stomach as quickly as possible and they reach their destination in the intestines alive and metabolically active.

#### Can I Take Omni-Biotic AB 10 With Other Supplements And / Or Medications?

Yes. Omni-Biotic probiotics contain only strains of bacteria that naturally occur in the human intestine, and no chemical agents that can interact with other supplements or medications.

Please note, when taking antibiotics, it is recommended to take Omni-Biotic AB 10 at least one (1) hour away from the antibiotic for optimal efficacy.

#### If I Take Antibiotics, Can I Take Omni-Biotic AB 10 At The Same Time?

Taking Omni-Biotic AB 10 during antibiotic treatment is very beneficial. Timing is important though. When taking antibiotics, it is recommended to take Omni-Biotic AB 10 at least one (1) hour away from the antibiotic for optimal efficacy.

#### What Are The Probiotic Strains Included In Omni-Biotic AB 10?

Omni-Biotic AB 10 contains ten specially selected, scientifically tested, well-characterized probiotic strains:

Lactobacillus acidophilus W55  
Lactobacillus salivarius W24  
Lactobacillus acidophilus W37  
Lactobacillus plantarum W62  
Lactobacillus paracasei W72  
Bifidobacterium bifidum W23  
Lactobacillus rhamnosus W71  
Bifidobacterium lactis W18  
Enterococcus faecium W54  
Bifidobacterium longum W51

#### Why Are There Other Ingredients In Addition To The Probiotics In Omni-Biotic AB 10?

The other ingredients included in Omni-Biotic AB 10 are: Non-GMO corn starch, maltodextrin, inulin, potassium chloride, rice protein, magnesium sulphate, fructo-oligosaccharides (FOS), enzymes (amylases), vanilla flavoring, manganese sulphate.

These ingredients are specifically added to improve the delivery of the probiotic bacteria to the intestines. A small amount of corn starch serves as the carrier. The other ingredients are a mix of prebiotic nutrients that serve as the food for the probiotics. When the powder is dissolved in water, the probiotics can hydrate and consume these specialized nutrients, and become strong for their passage through the digestive tract to the intestines where they will be most effective.

#### How Many Colony Forming Units (CFU) Are In Omni-Biotic AB 10?

Omni-Biotic AB 10 contains 5 billion CFU per serving/sachet.

#### How Many Servings Are In One Box Of Omni-Biotic AB 10?

One box of Omni-Biotic AB 10 includes 30 servings. This probiotic is shelf stable through the expiration date at room temperature.

#### Do I Have To Refrigerate This Probiotic?

No, Omni-Biotic AB 10 does not need to be refrigerated.

#### Do Omni-Biotic Probiotics Have Regulatory Approval?

All Omni-Biotic products meet “Generally Recognized As Safe” (GRAS) criteria specified by the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA).

Our products are developed by Institut AllergoSan in accordance with the highest quality criteria for probiotics presented by the FDA, World Health Organization (WHO), World Gastroenterology Organization (WGO), and Austrian/German Societies for Probiotic Medicine (OePROM / DePROM).

#### What Kind Of Testing Do You Do On Omni-Biotic Probiotics?

Omni-Biotic probiotics are developed by Institut AllergoSan “Competence Center for Microbiome Research,” based on over 25 years of gut microbiome research and 100+ clinical studies using our products.

Each strain of probiotic bacteria for how effective it is in achieving a specific health outcome. The team then tests the combination of strains that is included in one Omni-Biotic probiotic to make sure they work well together to achieve a desired outcome. All Omni-Biotic probiotics are tested for efficacy in their final version in clinical studies.

Key clinical studies using Omni-Biotic can be found in the Research / Education website section.

#### Where Can I Find The Clinical Studies That Test Omni-Biotic AB 10 For Antibiotic-Associated Diarrhea And Clostridium Difficile (C.Diff)?

You can find the clinical studies using Omni-Biotic AB 10 [here](https://c29aac-2.myshopify.com/pages/gut-antibiotic-impact "https://c29aac-2.myshopify.com/pages/gut-antibiotic-impact").

#### Are Omni-Biotic Probiotics Suitable For Vegetarians And Vegans?

All Omni-Biotic probiotics available on[omnibioticlife.com](http://www.omnibioticlife.com/) are vegan, lactose, gluten, and soy-free, and made up of non-GMO ingredients.

#### Can Omni-Biotic Be Used When Trying To Conceive, During Pregnancy, Postpartum And While Breastfeeding?

Yes, all Omni-Biotic probiotics are safe for use when trying to conceive, during pregnancy, postpartum and while breastfeeding.

In fact, supporting gut health via probiotics and prebiotics during pregnancy and the first few months after birth will help support a healthy pregnancy and lay the foundation for the infant’s health. Check out our prenatal and infant probiotic [here](/pages/prenatal-baby "Prenatal & Baby").

#### Are Omni-Biotic Probiotics Safe For Children?

Yes, most OMNi-BiOTiC® probiotics are safe for children.

**For babies and up to one year of age**: Omni-Biotic Panda was specifically developed for babies and young children to support the healthy development of the baby’s gut microbiome, digestive system, and immune function. It has also been shown in clinical studies to improve symptoms of infant colic and to reduce the risk of childhood allergies, such as eczema.

**For children between one and three years of age**: If the child is benefiting from Omni-Biotic Panda, this is often a good choice to continue until three years of age. Other probiotic formulations (except Omni-Biotic HETOX) can be taken at half of one sachet per day (i.e., half of the daily recommended dose for adults).

**For children older than three years of age**: Children above three years of age typically respond well to taking the regular daily recommended dose.

To improve the taste of the probiotic, you can dissolve it in infant formula, milk or yogurt, a dairy alternative, lukewarm soups and apple juice. Avoid juices that are too acidic such as orange juice as these negatively impact the probiotic bacteria.

It made a difference within about 3 days. I will definitely remain on this probiotic over the next couple months to try to build back a healthy gut! Definitely expensive, but well worth it, especially when taking antibiotics. Plus, the taste is not bad at all!

These probiotics are amazing. I’ve been on antibiotics for almost a month now and Omni-biotic has saved me. No secondary yeast infections and my gut feels good.

A probiotic supplement for kids to support the gut microbiome and optimal digestive function.

 

## Benefits

* Supports gut microbiome balance and function, especially during and after antibiotic intake
* Restores and maintains a diverse and balanced gut flora
* Includes the same 10 deeply studied probiotic strains as Omni-Biotic AB 10 in a kid-friendly, half dose powder for easy use

\*These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.

## Recommended Use

**Infants & toddlers (up to 3 years):** Take 1 sachet twice daily during antibiotic use. After completing antibiotics, continue with 1 sachet daily for 10-14 days.

**Children (ages 3-6):** Take 1-2 sachets twice daily during antibiotic use. After completing antibiotics,  
 continue with1 sachet once or twice daily for 10-14 days.

Omni- Biotic AB 10 Kids can also be taken once daily for ongoing digestive support.

Do not exceed daily recommended dose. Omni-Biotic AB 10 Kids is best taken on an empty stomach.

 1. Stir one sachet of Omni-Biotic AB 10 Kids in approximately 4 ounces/125 mL of room temperature water or other non-acidic liquid (dairy and dairy alternative milk or yoghurt, apple juice).

 2. Wait 1 minute for probiotic activation.

3. Stir again and let your child enjoy!

If taking antibiotics, separate probiotic  
 consumption from medication by 1 hour for best results.

* Lactobacillus acidophilus W55
* Lactobacillus paracasei W20

Lactobacillus salivarius W24  
Lactobacillus plantarum W62  
Bifidobacterium bifidum W23

#### Why Are There Other Ingredients In Addition To The Probiotics In Omni-Biotic AB 10 Kids?

The other ingredients included in Omni-Biotic AB 10 Kids , such as corn starch or maltodextrin are specifically added to improve the delivery of the probiotic bacteria to the intestines. A small amount of corn starch serves as the carrier. The maltodextrin is a prebiotic nutrient that serves as the food for the probiotics. When the powder is dissolved in liquid, the probiotics can hydrate and consume these specialized nutrients, and become strong for their passage through the digestive tract to the intestines where they will be most effective.

#### How Many Colony Forming Units (CFU) Are In Omni-Biotic AB 10 Kids?

Omni-Biotic AB 10 Kids contains 2.5 billion CFU per serving / sachet.

#### How Many Servings Are In One Box Of Omni-Biotic AB 10 Kids?

One box of Omni-Biotic AB 10 Kids includes 30 servings. This probiotic is shelf stable through the expiration date at room temperature.

#### Do I Have To Refrigerate This Probiotic?

No, Omni-Biotic AB 10 Kids does not need to be refrigerated.

#### How Does Omni-Biotic Ensure The Quality And Effectiveness Of Its Probiotics?

Omni-Biotic probiotics are developed by Institut AllergoSan’s “Competence Center for Microbiome Research,” based on over 25 years of gut microbiome research and 100+ clinical studies using our products.

Each strain of probiotic bacteria is tested for how effective it is in achieving a specific health outcome. The team then tests the combination of strains that is included in one Omni-Biotic probiotic formula to make sure they work well together to achieve a desired outcome. All Omni-Biotic probiotics are tested for efficacy in their final version in clinical studies. Key clinical studies using Omni-Biotic can be found in the Research / Education website section.

Our products are developed by Institut AllergoSan in accordance with the highest quality criteria for probiotics presented by the FDA, World Health Organization (WHO), World Gastroenterology Organization (WGO), and Austrian/German Societies for Probiotic Medicine (OePROM / DePROM).

#### Are Omni-Biotic Probiotics Suitable For Vegetarians And Vegans?

All Omni-Biotic probiotics available on omnibioticlife.com are vegan, lactose, gluten, and soy-free, and made up of non-GMO ingredients.

A probiotic supplement for kids to support the gut microbiome and optimal digestive function.

 

## Benefits

* Supports gut microbiome balance and function, especially during and after antibiotic intake
* Restores and maintains a diverse and balanced gut flora
* Includes the same 10 deeply studied probiotic strains as Omni-Biotic AB 10 in a kid-friendly, half dose powder for easy use

\*These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.

## Recommended Use

**Infants & toddlers (up to 3 years):** Take 1 sachet twice daily during antibiotic use. After completing antibiotics, continue with 1 sachet daily for 10-14 days.

**Children (ages 3-6):** Take 1-2 sachets twice daily during antibiotic use. After completing antibiotics,  
 continue with1 sachet once or twice daily for 10-14 days.

Omni- Biotic AB 10 Kids can also be taken once daily for ongoing digestive support.

Do not exceed daily recommended dose. Omni-Biotic AB 10 Kids is best taken on an empty stomach.

 1. Stir one sachet of Omni-Biotic AB 10 Kids in approximately 4 ounces/125 mL of room temperature water or other non-acidic liquid (dairy and dairy alternative milk or yoghurt, apple juice).

 2. Wait 1 minute for probiotic activation.

3. Stir again and let your child enjoy!

If taking antibiotics, separate probiotic  
 consumption from medication by 1 hour for best results.

## Composition

*Omni-Biotic AB 10 Kids contains 10 deeply studied probiotic strains in a gentle, half-dose formula compared to the original Omni-Biotic AB 10 Probiotic:*

* Lactobacillus acidophilus W55
* Lactobacillus paracasei W20
* Lactobacillus acidophilus W37
* Lactobacillus rhamnosus W71
* Lactobacillus plantarum W1
* Lactobacillus salivarius W24
* Bifidobacterium lactis W51
* Lactobacillus plantarum W62
* Enterococcus faecium W54
* Bifidobacterium bifidum W23

Other ingredients: Non-GMO corn starch, maltodextrin, inulin, plant protein (rice), fructooligosaccharides (FOS)

Returns must be initiated within 30 days of receiving your order.

## FAQ

#### What age group is the Omni-Biotic AB 10 Kids probiotic suitable for?

Omni-Biotic AB 10 Kids is suitable for babies and children. Please review the recommended intake on the product packaging or in question 2 below for recommended dose by age.

#### How Should My Child Best Take Omni-Biotic AB 10 Kids?

**Infants & toddlers (up to 3 years):** Take 1 sachet twice daily during antibiotic use. After completing antibiotics, continue with 1 sachet daily for 10-14 days.

**Children (ages 3-6):** Take 1-2 sachets twice daily during antibiotic use. After completing antibiotics, continue with1 sachet once or twice daily for 10-14 days.

Omni- Biotic AB 10 Kids can also be taken once daily for ongoing digestive support.

1. Stir one sachet of Omni-Biotic AB 10 Kids in approximately 4 ounces/125 mL of room temperature water or other non-acidic liquid (dairy and dairy alternative milk or yoghurt, apple juice).  
2. Wait 1 minute for probiotic activation.  
3. Stir again and let your child enjoy!

If taking antibiotics, separate probiotic consumption from medication by 1 hour for best results.

Omni-Biotic AB 10 Kids is best consumed on an empty stomach. This helps the probiotic bacteria move through the acidic environment of the stomach as quickly as possible, and they reach their destination in the intestines alive and metabolically active.  
  
Do not exceed daily recommended dose.

#### Can I Mix Omni-Biotic AB 10 Kids Into Anything Other Than Water For My Child?

Yes. Omni-Biotic probiotics can also be mixed into non-acidic liquids such as apple juice, milk or yogurt (or non-dairy alternatives), apple sauce and lukewarm soups. Acidic beverages such as orange juice should be avoided.

Make sure the liquid does not exceed 104 degrees Fahrenheit as this can kill the probiotics.

#### Can My Child Take Omni-Biotic AB 10 Kids More Than Once Daily?

Yes, Omni-Biotic AB 10 Kids can be taken twice daily, especially during antibiotic intake.

Toddlers (up to 3 years) continue with 1 sachet daily after antibiotic use.

Children (3-6 years) continue with 1 sachet once or twice daily after antibiotic use.

Do not exceed daily recommended dose.

#### Why Is It Beneficial for My Child To Take Omni-Biotic AB 10 Kids?

Omni-Biotic AB 10 Kids is designed to support a healthy gut microbiome, especially when the gut microbiome may have been disrupted due to medications such as antibiotics, travel to foreign countries or a food borne illness. This imbalance can lead to tummy troubles, weakened immunity, or even recurrent infections. **Omni-Biotic AB 10 Kids** is designed to gently restore and maintain your child’s gut flora balance and diversity, and with that support healthy digestion and gut function.

#### Can My Child Take Omni-Biotic AB 10 Kids With Other Supplements And / Or Medications?

Yes. Omni-Biotic AB 10 Kids is formulated to support digestive balance and help maintain a healthy gut microbiome, especially during and after antibiotic use. In most cases, Omni-Biotic AB 10 Kids can be safely taken alongside other supplements and medications. This formulation is designed to be gentle, well-tolerated, and supportive of overall health, making it a valuable addition to your child’s daily routine. Because every child is unique, we recommend to check with your pediatrician or healthcare provider before introducing a new supplement.

#### If My Child Takes Antibiotics, Can It Take Omni-Biotic AB 10 At The Same Time?

Taking Omni-Biotic AB 10 Kids during antibiotic treatment is very beneficial for your child. Timing is important though. When taking antibiotics, it is recommended to take Omni-Biotic AB 10 Kids at least one (1) hour away from the antibiotic for optimal efficacy.

#### What Are The Probiotic Strains Included In Omni-Biotic AB 10 Kids?

Omni-Biotic AB 10 Kids contains 10 specially selected, scientifically tested, well-characterized probiotic strains:

Lactobacillus acidophilus W55  
Lactobacillus acidophilus W37  
Lactobacillus plantarum W1  
Bifidobacterium lactis W51  
Enterococcus faecium W54  
Lactobacillus paracasei W20  
Lactobacillus rhamnosus W71  
Lactobacillus salivarius W24  
Lactobacillus plantarum W62  
Bifidobacterium bifidum W23

#### Why Are There Other Ingredients In Addition To The Probiotics In Omni-Biotic AB 10 Kids?

The other ingredients included in Omni-Biotic AB 10 Kids , such as corn starch or maltodextrin are specifically added to improve the delivery of the probiotic bacteria to the intestines. A small amount of corn starch serves as the carrier. The maltodextrin is a prebiotic nutrient that serves as the food for the probiotics. When the powder is dissolved in liquid, the probiotics can hydrate and consume these specialized nutrients, and become strong for their passage through the digestive tract to the intestines where they will be most effective.

#### How Many Colony Forming Units (CFU) Are In Omni-Biotic AB 10 Kids?

Omni-Biotic AB 10 Kids contains 2.5 billion CFU per serving / sachet.

#### How Many Servings Are In One Box Of Omni-Biotic AB 10 Kids?

One box of Omni-Biotic AB 10 Kids includes 30 servings. This probiotic is shelf stable through the expiration date at room temperature.

#### Do I Have To Refrigerate This Probiotic?

No, Omni-Biotic AB 10 Kids does not need to be refrigerated.

#### How Does Omni-Biotic Ensure The Quality And Effectiveness Of Its Probiotics?

Omni-Biotic probiotics are developed by Institut AllergoSan’s “Competence Center for Microbiome Research,” based on over 25 years of gut microbiome research and 100+ clinical studies using our products.

Each strain of probiotic bacteria is tested for how effective it is in achieving a specific health outcome. All Omni-Biotic probiotics are tested for efficacy in their final version in clinical studies. Key clinical studies using Omni-Biotic can be found in the Research / Education website section.

Our products are developed by Institut AllergoSan in accordance with the highest quality criteria for probiotics presented by the FDA, World Health Organization (WHO), World Gastroenterology Organization (WGO), and Austrian/German Societies for Probiotic Medicine (OePROM / DePROM).

2. Wait 1 minute for probiotic activation.
3. Stir again and enjoy!

Omni-Biotic probiotic is best consumed on an empty stomach, for example right after waking up in the morning or before going to bed in the evening.

For the Gut Health Reset Program, this is the recommended order in which to take the three, different probiotics for optimal results:   
 Month 1: Take Omni-Biotic AB 10 probiotic.   
 Month 2: Take Omni-Biotic Stress Release probiotic.  
 Month 3: Take Omni-Biotic Balance probiotic.

3. Rebalance Gut Flora: Lastly, the goal is to rebalance the gut flora, supporting healthy digestion, immune function, cognition, and detoxification

## FAQ

#### What is the Gut Health Reset Program?

This three-month probiotic program is designed to reset the gut microbiome and support overall wellness. Based on over 30 years of gut microbiome research, this program is curated by Omni-Biotic’s Founder, Anita Frauwallner, with the goal of helping you achieve your most vital self.

For month 1, you take the Omni-Biotic AB 10 probiotic to eliminate bad bacteria, viruses, and yeasts. These build up over time and contribute to digestive issues.

In month 2, you take the Omni-Biotic Stress Release probiotic to replenish the good bacteria in the gut, repair the gut barrier, and reduce local and systemic inflammation.

In month 3, you take the Omni-Biotic Balance probiotic to rebalance the gut flora, support healthy digestion, immune function, cognition, and detoxification.

#### What are the Health Benefits of this Program?

Three months of taking these specific Omni-Biotic probiotics will:

* Restore bacterial diversity in the gut microbiome
* Improve gut barrier function
* Reduce inflammation
* Optimize digestive comfort and function
* Support healthy immune response
* Strengthen the gut-brain axis

#### Who is this Program Best Suited For?

Our Gut Health Reset Program is recommended for those who are starting out on their gut healing journey as well as people who are looking to restore their gut health following infection, use of antimicrobial medication, and years of high stress living.

#### What Strains of Beneficial Bacteria Are Included in this Program?

Omni-Biotic AB 10 contains ten specially selected, scientifically tested human bacterial strains.  
  
Lactobacillus acidophilus W55  
Lactobacillus W37  
Lactobacillus paracasei W72

Bifidobacterium lactis W51  
  
Omni-Biotic Stress Release contains nine specially selected, scientifically tested human bacterial strains.

Lactobacillus salivarius W24

Omni-Biotic Balance contains six important, highly active, human bacterial strains that inhabit every inch of the intestine.

Bifidobacterium animals W53  
Lactobacillus acidophilus W55  
Lactobacillus salivarius W57  
Enterococcus faecium W54  
Lactococcus lactis W58  
Lactobacillus casei W56

#### Why Are There Other Ingredients Included in Each Omni-Biotic Probiotic?

The freeze-dried powder of Omni-Biotic probiotics contains different prebiotic ingredients that serve as food for the beneficial bacteria. When the probiotic powder is dissolved in water prior to intake, the freeze-dried probiotic bacteria rehydrate and begin to consume these prebiotic nutrients. This makes them strong for their passage through the digestive tract, and ensures high probiotic survival rates into the gut.

If you extend the activation time of Omni-Biotic to up to 30 minutes, the bacteria almost completely metabolize their food so that, at most, only a few molecules of these substances enter your body.

#### Which Probiotic Formulation Should I Continue With After Completing This Program?

You can stick with your favorite probiotic formulation from the Gut Health Reset Program. Or, you can take our [Probiotic Fit Quiz](/pages/probiotic-fit-quiz "Probiotic Fit Quiz") to find the best formulation for your current health needs. We’re also happy to answer any questions and help guide you – contact us at info@omnibioticlife.com or 914-615-9914.

#### How to Best Take the Probiotics in the Gut Health Reset Program?

During the Gut Health Reset Program, you will seamlessly transition through a curated sequence of probiotics over a three-month period. You begin the program with Omni-Biotic AB 10, followed by Omni-Biotic Stress Release, and lastly Omni-Biotic Balance. 

1. Stir one sachet of Omni-Biotic probiotics in approximately 4 ounces of room temperature water or other non-acidic liquid (i.e. dairy/dairy alternative milk or yogurt, apple juice).
2. Wait 1 minute for probiotic activation.
3. Stir again and enjoy!

Please note that Omni-Biotic probiotics are best taken on an empty stomach.

#### Can I Take the Gut Health Reset Program Alongside Other Medications/Supplements?

Yes, Omni-Biotic probiotics contain only strains of bacteria that naturally occur in the human intestine, and no chemical agents that can interact with other supplements or medications.

It is, however, recommended to take Omni-Biotic probiotics at least one hour away from other supplements and/or medications.

#### Can I Dissolve Omni-Biotic in Anything Other than Water?

Omni-Biotic probiotics are manufactured in the form of freeze-dried bacteria that need to be rehydrated before intake. Due to its neutral pH value, room temperature water creates the optimal environment to activate the bacteria and to energize them for their journey through your gastro-intestinal tract.

If you prefer, milk or yogurt, as well as apple juice are also well suited to rehydrate Omni-Biotic.

Please note that, in general, the liquid in which you dissolve Omni-Biotic should be under 100 degrees Fahrenheit and non-acidic. If the liquid is too cold, the bacteria cannot sufficiently “wake up” from their freeze-dried state. If the liquid is too hot, then they will die before you drink them. Juices and coffee are too acidic for the probiotic bacteria to survive. It is also not recommended to throw the Omni-Biotic powder into a power blender as part of a smoothie mix.

#### Are There Any Side Effects of Using this Product?

Depending on the health of your gut microbiome, it may be that you experience mild digestive issues (e.g. mild bloating, gas, diarrhea) the first few days of using this product. This is a sign that your gut flora is rebalancing and potentially eliminating any pathogens.

If this is the case, it is recommended that you introduce Omni-Biotic slowly over the course of a few days (beginning with the amount of a knife-tip) to minimize possible digestive issues. Such situations are rare and only occur in about 5% of users.

#### How Should the Product be Stored?

All Omni-Biotic probiotics are shelf-stable at room temperature. They should be stored in a cool and dry place, but do not need to be refrigerated.

#### What is the Shelf Life of this Product?

Omni-Biotic probiotics have a shelf life of 12-18 months.

#### Do Omni-Biotic Probiotics Have Regulatory Approval?

All Omni-Biotic products available in the U.S. have FDA GRAS (Generally Recognized As Safe) status and meet the quality criteria for medically relevant pro and synbiotics.

Omni-Biotic products are developed by Institut AllergoSan in accordance with quality criteria of the World Health Organization (WHO), the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA), the World Gastroenterology Organization (WGO), and the Austrian/German Societies for Probiotic Medicine (OePROM / DePROM).

#### Are Omni-Biotic Probiotics Suitable For Vegetarians and Vegans?

Almost all Omni-Biotic products available on omnibioticlife.com are certified vegan, as well as lactose, gluten, and soy-free, and made up of non-GMO ingredients.

Please note that our Omni-Logic Plus prebiotic contains a small amount of lactose, and is therefore considered to be vegetarian.

#### Is this Product Safe to Use for Pregnant or Breastfeeding Women?

Yes, all Omni-Biotic probiotics are safe for use during pregnancy, post-partum, while breastfeeding and when trying to conceive. In fact, taking a high-quality probiotic supplement during pregnancy and the first few months after birth will help support a healthy pregnancy and lay the foundation for baby’s health.

That being said, it is always best to check with your healthcare practitioner for all supplements you are taking, especially during pregnancy and while breastfeeding.

#### Is this Product Safe to Use for Children?

Yes, most Omni-Biotic probiotics are safe for children. Omni-Biotic Hetox is not recommended for children.

For babies and up to one year of age: Omni-Biotic Panda was specifically developed for babies and young children to support the healthy development of the baby’s gut microbiome, digestive system, and immune function. It has also been shown in clinical studies to improve symptoms of infant colic and to reduce the risk of childhood allergies, such as eczema.

For children between one and three years of age: If the child is benefiting from Omni-Biotic Panda, this is often a good choice to continue until three years of age. Other probiotic formulations (except Omni-Biotic Hetox) can be taken at half of one sachet per day (i.e., half of the daily recommended dose for adults).

For children older than three years of age: Children above three years of age typically respond well to taking the regular daily recommended dose.

To improve the taste of the probiotic, you can dissolve it in baby formula, milk or yogurt, non-dairy milk or yogurt, lukewarm soups and apple juice. Avoid juices that are too acidic, such as orange juice, as these negatively impact the probiotic bacteria.

#### What is Your Return Policy?

To initiate a return or exchange, please kindly contact our Customer Service team at info@omnibioticlife.com or 914-615-9914. Claims for shortages or damages must be reported within 10 days of receiving your order.

## FAQ

#### What is the Immune Support Bundle?

The Immune Support Bundle was specifically formulated to address and support the immune system via the gut, which houses 80% of our immune cells.

Our Omni-Biotic Balance probiotic enhances gut health, which in turn plays a crucial role in the body's immune response. A healthy gut flora will improve the gut barrier, contribute to the production of beneficial microbes, and support the balance of immune cells.

Our Omni-Logic Immune prebiotic provides nutritional support to these beneficial bacteria, further aiding in the maintenance of a healthy immune system. Prebiotic supplements also help increase your overall daily fiber intake. Dietary fiber is the food source of our good gut bacteria, and esnuring that we consume sufficient fiber each day helps keep our good gut bacteria happy and thriving.

#### What are the Health Benefits of this Bundle?

Taking these specific Omni-Biotic probiotic and Omni-Logic prebiotic will:

* Support healthy immune function and response
* Balance healthy inflammatory response and allergen management
* Improve energy
* Optimize digestive function and comfort
* Improve transport of stool through intestines, optimizing bowel movements
* Support healthy balance of yeast and bacteria in the gut

#### Who is this Bundle Best Suited For?

The Immune Support Bundle is best suited for individuals who need an extra boost of immune support and want to maintain a balanced gut microbiome.

#### What Strains of Beneficial Bacteria Are Included in this Program?

Omni-Biotic Balance contains six specially selected bacterial strains.

Lactobacillus acidophilus W55  
Lactobacillus W37  
Lactobacillus paracasei W72  
Lactobacillus rhamnosus W71  
Enterococcus faecium W54  
Lactobacillus plantarum W62  
Lactobaciullus plantarum W1  
Bifidobacterium bifidum W23  
Bifidobacterium lactis W51

Omni-Logic Immune contains the following ingredients:

Resistant corn dextrin Acacia gum  
Calcium carbonate  
Zinc citrate  
Nicotinamide  
Cholecalciferol  
Riboflavin  
Natural vanilla flavor

#### Why are there other ingredients included in Omni-Biotic Balance probiotic?

The freeze-dried powder of Omni-Biotic probiotics contains different prebiotic ingredients that serve as food for the beneficial bacteria. When the probiotic powder is dissolved in water prior to intake, the freeze-dried probiotic bacteria rehydrate and begin to consume these prebiotic nutrients. This makes them strong for their passage through the digestive tract, and ensures high probiotic survival rates into the gut.

If you extend the activation time of Omni-Biotic to up to 30 minutes, the bacteria almost completely metabolize their food so that, at most, only a few molecules of these substances enter your body.

#### How to Best Take the Products in the Immune Support Bundle?

Omni-Biotic Balance probiotic should be taken first thing in the morning on an empty stomach, whereas Omni-Logic Immune prebiotic should be taken right before a meal.

Omni-Biotic Balance Probiotic:

1. Stir one sachet of Omni-Biotic Balance in approximately 4 ounces of room temperature water or other non-acidic liquid (i.e. dairy/dairy alternative milk or yogurt, apple juice).
2. Wait 1 minute for probiotic activation.
3. Stir again and enjoy!

Omni-Logic Immune Prebiotic:

1-3 times per day, dissolve 1 measuring spoon (5 g) of Omni-Logic Immune in approximately 4-6 oz of still, room temperature water or beverage of your choice, stir, and then drink the mixture. There is no need to wait for activation of the prebiotic powder in the water.

Tip: Start with ½ measuring spoon once a day for 3 days. Then gradually increase to the full daily recommended amount of 1 measuring spoon 3 times per day. This allows your good gut bacteria to multiply appropriately. The measuring spoon can be found inside the product container and may be buried within the prebiotic powder.

#### Can I Take the Immune Support Bundle Alongside Other Medications/Supplements?

Yes, Omni-Biotic probiotics contain only strains of bacteria that naturally occur in the human intestine, and no chemical agents that can interact with other supplements or medications. Furthermore, Omni-Logic prebiotics are dietary fibers and do not pose a risk of being taken with other supplements and/or medications.

It is, however, recommended to take Omni-Biotic probiotics and Omni-Logic prebiotics at least one hour away from other supplements and/or medications.

#### Can I Dissolve Omni-Biotic in Anything Other than Water?

Omni-Biotic probiotics are manufactured in the form of freeze-dried bacteria that need to be reactivated before intake. Due to its basic pH value, room temperature water creates the optimal environment to activate the bacteria and to energize them for their journey through your gastro-intestinal tract.

If you prefer, milk or yogurt, as well as apple juice are also well suited to rehydrate Omni-Biotic.

Please note that, in general, the liquid in which you dissolve Omni-Biotic should be under 100 degrees Fahrenheit and non-acidic. If the liquid is too cold, the bacteria cannot sufficiently “wake up” from their freeze-dried state. If the liquid is too hot, then they will die before you drink them. Juices and coffee are too acidic for the probiotic bacteria to survive.

#### Are There Any Side Effects of Using this Product?

Depending on the health of your gut microbiome, it may be that you experience mild digestive issues (e.g. bloating, gas, diarrhea) the first few days of using this product. This is a sign that your gut flora is rebalancing and potentially eliminating any pathogens. If this is the case, it is recommended that you introduce Omni-Biotic slowly over the course of a few days (beginning with the amount of a knife-tip) to minimize possible digestive side effects. Such situations are rare and only occur in about 5% of users.

#### How Should the Product be Stored?

All Omni-Biotic probiotics and Omni-Logic prebiotics are shelf-stable at room temperature. They should be stored in a cool and dry place and do not require refrigeration.

#### What is the Shelf Life of this Product?

Omni-Biotic probiotics have a shelf life of 12-18 months, and Omni-Logic prebiotics have a shelf-life of 6 months.

#### Do Omni-Biotic Products Have Regulatory Approval?

All products available on omnibioticlife.com have FDA GRAS (Generally Recognized As Safe) status and meet the quality criteria for medically relevant pro and synbiotics.

Omni-Biotic products are developed by Institut AllergoSan in accordance with quality criteria of the World Health Organization (WHO), the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA), the World Gastroenterology Organization (WGO), and the Austrian/German Societies for Probiotic Medicine (OePROM / DePROM).

#### Are Omni-Biotic Probiotics Suitable For Vegetarians And Vegans?

Almost all Omni-Biotic products available on omnibioticlife.com are certified vegan, as well as lactose, gluten, and soy-free, and made up of non-GMO ingredients. Please note that our Omni-Logic Plus prebiotic does contain a small amount of lactose and is therefore considered vegetarian.

#### Is this Product Safe to Use for Pregnant or Breastfeeding Women?

Yes, all Omni-Biotic products are safe for use during pregnancy, post-partum, while breastfeeding and when trying to conceive. In fact, taking a high-quality probiotic or prebiotic supplement during pregnancy and the first few months after birth will help support a healthy pregnancy and help lay the foundation for the baby’s health.

That being said, it is always best to check with your individual healthcare practitioner for all supplements you are taking, especially during pregnancy and breastfeeding.

#### Is this Product Safe to Use for Children?

Yes, most Omni-Biotic probiotics are safe for children. Omni-Biotic Hetox is not recommended for children.

For babies and up to one year of age: Omni-Biotic Panda was specifically developed for babies and young children to support the healthy development of the baby’s gut microbiome, digestive system, and immune function. It has also been shown in clinical studies to improve symptoms of infant colic and to reduce the risk of childhood allergies, such as eczema.

For children between one and three years of age: If the child is benefiting from Omni-Biotic Panda, this is often a good choice to continue until three years of age. Other probiotic formulations (except Omni-Biotic Hetox) can be taken at half of one sachet per day (i.e., half of the daily recommended dose for adults).

For children older than three years of age: Children above three years of age typically respond well to taking the regular daily recommended dose. Omni-Biotic Hetox is not recommended for children.

To improve the taste of the probiotic, you can dissolve it in infant formula, milk or yogurt, a dairy alternative, lukewarm soups and apple juice. Avoid juices that are too acidic such as orange juice as these negatively impact the probiotic bacteria.

All Omni-Logic products are safe for children over the age of six years. It is recommended to give children a reduced dosage, starting with a knife tip per day in a large glass of water. For Omni-Logic Plus, it is important to add sufficient liquid to ensure safe and easy ingestion, because the product can gelatinize.

#### What is Your Return Policy?

To initiate a return or exchange, please kindly contact our Customer Service team at info@omnibioticlife.com or 914-615-9914. Claims for shortages or damages must be reported within 10 days of receiving your order.

## Recommended Use

Adults: Stir one sachet of Omni-Biotic PandA in approximately 4 ounces of room temperature water or other non-acidic liquid (e.g. dairy or dairy alternative milk or yogurt, apple juice), wait 10 minutes for probiotic activation, stir again and drink. Take one sachet daily or as directed by your healthcare practitioner. Omni-Biotic PandA is best consumed on an empty stomach, for example right after waking up in the morning or before going to bed in the evening.

Babies: Once daily, stir one sachet of Omni-Biotic Panda into a small amount of breast milk, formula, or boiled and cooled water. Feed to infant with a dropper or bottle. Caution: do not heat probiotic above 104°F.

###### [Can You Take Probiotics While Pregnant? Are They Safe?](/blogs/blog/taking-probiotics-while-pregnant)

## FAQ

#### How Should I Best Take Omni-Biotic Panda?

For Omni-Biotic Panda probiotic, please follow these intake instructions:  
  
**Adults**: Stir 1 sachet of Omni-Biotic Panda once daily into a glass of still water (approx. 4 oz/125 mL) at room temperature, wait at least 10 minutes for bacterial activation, stir again and then drink. Omni-Biotic Panda should preferably be taken on an empty stomach, either right after waking up in the morning or before going to bed in the evening.  
  
**Babies**: Stir 1 sachet of Omni-Biotic Panda once daily into 1 tablespoon of breast milk, formula, or boiled (and cooled) water, and trickle this special mixture directly into the infant’s mouth with a dropper. If you are not breastfeeding your baby, stir 1 sachet of Omni-Biotic Panda into the baby bottle every day (Caution: Do not heat above 104°F).

#### Can I Mix Omni-Biotic Panda Into Anything Other Than Water?

Yes. Omni-Biotic probiotics can also be mixed into non-acidic liquids such as apple juice, milk or yogurt (or non-dairy alternatives), apple sauce and lukewarm soups. Acidic beverages such as coffee, tea and orange juice should be avoided. For babies, Omni-Biotic Panda can also be mixed into breastmilk or formula.  
  
Make sure the liquid does not exceed 104 degrees Fahrenheit as this can kill the probiotics.

#### Can I Take Omni-Biotic Panda More Than Once Daily?

Yes, Omni-Biotic Panda can be taken twice daily, especially if you are experiencing pregnancy-related constipation, immune system imbalance or stress.

For babies and toddlers up to three years of age, Omni-Biotic Panda should be limited to once daily.

#### Can I Take Omni-Biotic Panda On An Empty Stomach, Or Should I Take The Probiotic With Food / A Meal?

All Omni-Biotic probiotics are best taken on an empty stomach. This helps the probiotic bacteria move through the acidic environment of the stomach as quickly as possible, and they reach their destination in the intestines alive and metabolically active.  
  
For babies and toddlers, it is absolutely fine and still effective to take the probiotic with a meal, since you might be mixing Omni-Biotic Panda into your baby’s bottle or giving it to them while breastfeeding. The gastric juices of babies and toddlers are not as strong as those of adults, and therefore less disruptive to probiotic bacteria.

#### Can I Take Omni-Biotic Panda With Other Supplements And / Or Medications?

Yes. Omni-Biotic probiotics contain only strains of bacteria that naturally occur in the human intestine, and no chemical agents that can interact with other supplements or medications.

#### What Are The Probiotic Strains Included In Omni-Biotic Panda?

Omni-Biotic Panda contains three specially selected, scientifically tested, well-characterized probiotic strains:

#### Why Are There Other Ingredients In Addition To The Probiotics In Omni-Biotic Panda?

The other ingredients included in Omni-Biotic Panda are rice starch and maltodextrin.

These ingredients are specifically added to improve the delivery of the probiotic bacteria to the intestines. A small amount of rice starch serves as the carrier. The maltodextrin is a prebiotic nutrient that serves as the food for the probiotics. When the powder is dissolved in liquid, the probiotics can hydrate and consume these specialized nutrients, and become strong for their passage through the digestive tract to the intestines where they will be most effective.

#### Why Is It Beneficial To Take A Omni-Biotic Panda Probiotic During Pregnancy?

A woman’s gut microbiome changes considerably during pregnancy. These changes have been associated with various undesirable health effects. One common digestive complaint during pregnancy is constipation. A probiotic like Omni-Biotic Panda helps with that.

The mother’s immune system also adapts to accommodate the fetus, which can make her more susceptible to infections such as a common cold or the flu. It is important to support the mother’s immune system so it can adjust to the changes occurring during pregnancy and postpartum. The probiotic strains in Omni-Biotic Panda help rebalance the mother’s immune system (Th1 and Th2 cell balance), which can benefit the mother and also the baby while breastfeeding.

#### Why Is It Beneficial To Give Omni-Biotic Panda Probiotic To Babies?

A baby’s gut microbiome develops from birth to 36 months of age. An imbalance or lack of diversity in good bacteria in the gut microbiome can impact immune function, susceptibility to allergies, digestion and even cognitive function later in the child’s life. A probiotic like Omni-Biotic Panda supports the development of a healthy gut microbiome.

Infants also often struggle with digestive issues such as 3-month colic. In a clinical study, Omni-Biotic Panda reduced symptoms associated with 3-month colic.

#### How Many Colony Forming Units (CFU) Are In Omni-Biotic Panda?

Omni-Biotic Panda contains 3 billion CFU per serving/sachet.

#### How Many Servings Are In One Box Of Omni-Biotic Panda?

One box of Omni-Biotic Panda includes 30 servings. This probiotic is shelf stable through the expiration date at room temperature.

#### Do I Have To Refrigerate This Probiotic?

No, Omni-Biotic Panda does not need to be refrigerated.

#### Do Omni-Biotic Probiotics Have Regulatory Approval?

All Omni-Biotic products meet “Generally Recognized As Safe” (GRAS) criteria specified by the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA).

Our products are developed by Institut AllergoSan in accordance with the highest quality criteria for probiotics presented by the FDA, World Health Organization (WHO), World Gastroenterology Organization (WGO), and Austrian/German Societies for Probiotic Medicine (OePROM / DePROM).

#### What Kind Of Testing Do You Do On Omni-Biotic Probiotics?

Omni-Biotic probiotics are developed by Institut AllergoSan “Competence Center for Microbiome Research,” based on over 25 years of gut microbiome research and 100+ clinical studies using our products.  
  
Each strain of probiotic bacteria for how effective it is in achieving a specific health outcome. The team then tests the combination of strains that is included in one Omni-Biotic probiotic to make sure they work well together to achieve a desired outcome. All Omni-Biotic probiotics are tested for efficacy in their final version in clinical studies.  
  
Key clinical studies using Omni-Biotic can be found in the Research / Education website section.

#### Where Can I Find The Clinical Studies That Test Omni-Biotic Panda?

You can find the clinical studies using Omni-Biotic Panda [here](https://c29aac-2.myshopify.com/pages/gut-maternal-neonatal).

#### Can Omni-Biotic Be Used When Trying To Conceive, During Pregnancy, Postpartum And While Breastfeeding?

Yes, all Omni-Biotic probiotics are safe for use when trying to conceive, during pregnancy, postpartum and while breastfeeding.  
  
Omni-Biotic Panda was specifically formulated to support a woman’s immune system, digestion and gut health during the third trimester of pregnancy.  
  
Improving gut health via probiotics and prebiotics during pregnancy and the first few months after birth will help support a healthy pregnancy and lay the foundation for the baby’s health.

#### Are Omni-Biotic Probiotics Suitable For Vegetarians And Vegans?

All Omni-Biotic probiotics available on omnibioticlife.com are vegan, lactose, gluten, and soy-free, and made up of non-GMO ingredients.

#### Is Omni-Biotic Panda Safe For Babies And Children?

Yes, Omni-Biotic Panda was specifically formulated for babies to support the development of a healthy gut microbiome and immune system. It is recommended to give Omni-Biotic Panda to babies starting at birth and through three years of age. From then on, you can select another Omni-Biotic probiotic based on the child’s health needs.   
  
**For children older than three years of age**: Children above three years of age typically respond well to taking the regular daily recommended dose. Omni-Biotic HETOX is typically not recommended for children under six years of age, unless under supervision by a healthcare practitioner.  
  
To improve the taste of the probiotic, you can dissolve it in infant formula, milk or yogurt, a dairy alternative, lukewarm soups and apple juice. Avoid juices that are too acidic such as orange juice as these negatively impact the probiotic bacteria.

## Customer Reviews

My toddler has loved taking this probiotic, surprisingly, and asks for it every morning. Trust this brand and it’s regulating effects on the body.

I heard about this product when i lived in Germany. My toddler has been taking this product for a while and I can definitely say that it helps with her having more regular bowel movement. I am happy that we can get it here is USA.

I drink my probiotic right after I wake up. It starts my system and my can see the benefit through the day.

Wonderful product. Very happy with it

I was quite skeptical that a probiotic could work from day 1 as I had tried several probiotics from America in the past and were ineffective or did nothing. I tried this one because it was not a pill, rather a powder and I was surprised to see that it worked from day 1. I’m taking the Panda version since I’m experiencing pregnancy constipation and even my doctor took down my recommendation since this is a very common symptom. Needless to say, I will continue to take these.

Take one sachet daily or as directed by your healthcare practitioner. Omni-Biotic PandA is best consumed on an empty stomach, for example right after waking up in the morning or before going to bed in the evening.

Babies: Once daily, stir one sachet of Omni-Biotic Panda into a small amount of breast milk, formula, or boiled and cooled water. Feed to infant with a dropper or bottle. Caution: do not heat probiotic above 104°F.

A baby’s gut microbiome develops from birth to 36 months of age. An imbalance or lack of diversity in good bacteria in the gut microbiome can impact immune function, susceptibility to allergies, digestion and even cognitive function later in the child’s life. A probiotic like Omni-Biotic Panda supports the development of a healthy gut microbiome.

Infants also often struggle with digestive issues such as 3-month colic. In a clinical study, Omni-Biotic Panda reduced symptoms associated with 3-month colic.

#### How Many Colony Forming Units (CFU) Are In Omni-Biotic Panda?

Omni-Biotic Panda contains 3 billion CFU per serving/sachet.

#### How Many Servings Are In One Box Of Omni-Biotic Panda?

One box of Omni-Biotic Panda includes 30 servings. This probiotic is shelf stable through the expiration date at room temperature.

#### Do I Have To Refrigerate This Probiotic?

No, Omni-Biotic Panda does not need to be refrigerated.

#### Do Omni-Biotic Probiotics Have Regulatory Approval?

All Omni-Biotic products meet “Generally Recognized As Safe” (GRAS) criteria specified by the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA).

Our products are developed by Institut AllergoSan in accordance with the highest quality criteria for probiotics presented by the FDA, World Health Organization (WHO), World Gastroenterology Organization (WGO), and Austrian/German Societies for Probiotic Medicine (OePROM / DePROM).

#### What Kind Of Testing Do You Do On Omni-Biotic Probiotics?

Omni-Biotic probiotics are developed by Institut AllergoSan “Competence Center for Microbiome Research,” based on over 25 years of gut microbiome research and 100+ clinical studies using our products.  
  
Each strain of probiotic bacteria for how effective it is in achieving a specific health outcome. The team then tests the combination of strains that is included in one Omni-Biotic probiotic to make sure they work well together to achieve a desired outcome. All Omni-Biotic probiotics are tested for efficacy in their final version in clinical studies.  
  
Key clinical studies using Omni-Biotic can be found in the Research / Education website section.

#### Where Can I Find The Clinical Studies That Test Omni-Biotic Panda?

You can find the clinical studies using Omni-Biotic Panda [here](https://c29aac-2.myshopify.com/pages/gut-maternal-neonatal).

#### Can Omni-Biotic Be Used When Trying To Conceive, During Pregnancy, Postpartum And While Breastfeeding?

Yes, all Omni-Biotic probiotics are safe for use when trying to conceive, during pregnancy, postpartum and while breastfeeding.  
  
Omni-Biotic Panda was specifically formulated to support a woman’s immune system, digestion and gut health during the third trimester of pregnancy.  
  
Improving gut health via probiotics and prebiotics during pregnancy and the first few months after birth will help support a healthy pregnancy and lay the foundation for the baby’s health.

#### Are Omni-Biotic Probiotics Suitable For Vegetarians And Vegans?

All Omni-Biotic probiotics available on omnibioticlife.com are vegan, lactose, gluten, and soy-free, and made up of non-GMO ingredients.

#### Is Omni-Biotic Panda Safe For Babies And Children?

Yes, Omni-Biotic Panda was specifically formulated for babies to support the development of a healthy gut microbiome and immune system. It is recommended to give Omni-Biotic Panda to babies starting at birth and through three years of age. From then on, you can select another Omni-Biotic probiotic based on the child’s health needs.   
  
**For children older than three years of age**: Children above three years of age typically respond well to taking the regular daily recommended dose. Omni-Biotic HETOX is typically not recommended for children under six years of age, unless under supervision by a healthcare practitioner.  
  
To improve the taste of the probiotic, you can dissolve it in infant formula, milk or yogurt, a dairy alternative, lukewarm soups and apple juice. Avoid juices that are too acidic such as orange juice as these negatively impact the probiotic bacteria.

## Customer Reviews

My toddler has loved taking this probiotic, surprisingly, and asks for it every morning. Trust this brand and it’s regulating effects on the body.

I heard about this product when i lived in Germany. My toddler has been taking this product for a while and I can definitely say that it helps with her having more regular bowel movement. I am happy that we can get it here is USA.

I drink my probiotic right after I wake up. It starts my system and my can see the benefit through the day.

Wonderful product. Very happy with it

I was quite skeptical that a probiotic could work from day 1 as I had tried several probiotics from America in the past and were ineffective or did nothing. I tried this one because it was not a pill, rather a powder and I was surprised to see that it worked from day 1. I’m taking the Panda version since I’m experiencing pregnancy constipation and even my doctor took down my recommendation since this is a very common symptom. Needless to say, I will continue to take these.

A probiotic supplement for kids to support digestion, emotional balance, and resilience to stress.

 

## Benefits

* Supports gut microbiome diversity
* Improves digestion and gut function, especially during times of stress
* Promotes emotional balance and resilience to stress
* Includes the same 9 deeply studied probiotic strains as Omni-Biotic Stress Release, in a kid-friendly, half dose, fast-melt powder for easy and delicious daily use
* Ideal for school: melts on the tongue, no water needed.

\*These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.

## Recommended Use

Children ages 3 years and up may take 1 – 2 Omni-Biotic Stress Release Kids sticks daily.

Tear open the packet along the perforation and allow the contents to dissolve directly on the tongue. No water needed.

## Composition

*Omni-Biotic Stress Release Kids contains 9 deeply studied probiotic strains in a gentle, half-dose formula compared to the original Omni-Biotic Stress Release Probiotic:*

* Lactobacillus casei W56
* Lactobacillus acidophilus W22
* Lactobacillus paracasei W20
* Bifidobacterium lactis W51
* Lactobacillus salivarius W24
* Lactococcus lactis W19
* Bifidobacterium lactis W52
* Lactobacillus plantarum W62
* Bifidobacterium bifidum W23

Other ingredients: Riboflavin (0.21 mg), Xylitol (sweetener), non-GMO corn starch, maltodextrin, corn dextrin, fructooligosaccharides (FOS), inulin, malic acid (acidifier), natural peach flavor

Free shipping for orders over $100. FedEx 2-day shipping for regular orders.

Returns must be initiated within 30 days of receiving your order.

Gut-Regulated Emotional Support & Stress Management

The gut microbiome is often referred to as our “second brain.” Beyond supporting digestion, the gut plays a pivotal role in brain function. Stress-related imbalances in the gut can impair gut barrier function, contribute to leaky gut and increase whole body inflammation that can impair everything from immune function to detoxification and to mood and focus.

School can be a major challenge for children: 40% of children experience pressure to perform, fear of failing, and problems with classmates and teachers. Regular use of **Omni-Biotic Stress Release Kids** helps balance the negative impact of stress on the gut and whole body, and supports the gut-brain axis, improving mood and concentration. This probiotic is an ally for parents of school-age children that are navigating the stressors of modern, everyday life.

## FAQ

#### What age group is the Omni-Biotic Stress Release Kids probiotic suitable for?

Omni-Biotic Stress Release Kids is suitable for children and toddlers from 3 years and up.

#### How Should My Child Best Take Omni-Biotic Stress Release Kids?

Children ages 3 and up take 1 - 2 Omni-Biotic Stress Release Kids packets daily (=1.2 g). Tear open the packet along the perforation and allow the contents to dissolve directly on the tongue - no water needed.

For best results take on an empty stomach. This helps the probiotic bacteria move through the acidic environment of the stomach as quickly as possible, and they reach their destination in the intestines alive and metabolically active.

Do not exceed daily recommended dose.

#### Can My Child Take Omni-Biotic Stress Release Kids More Than Once Daily?

Yes, children and toddlers 3 years and up can take up to 2 Omni-Biotic Stress Release packets daily.

For best results take on an empty stomach. Do not exceed daily recommended dose.

#### Why Is It Beneficial for My Child To Take Omni-Biotic Stress Release Kids?

Omni-Biotic Stress Release Kids is specially formulated to support your child’s gut microbiome, which plays a vital role in emotional balance, focus, and overall well-being.

The gut and brain are deeply connected through the gut-brain axis—a communication network where a balanced gut helps regulate mood, stress response, and cognitive function. When children experience stress, it can disrupt their gut microbiome and increase intestinal inflammation, which may negatively affect this important connection.

By nurturing a healthy gut, Omni-Biotic Stress Release Kids helps support your child’s ability to manage everyday stress, stay calm, and maintain focus. This gentle, kid-sized version of our clinically studied adult formula is designed to provide targeted support for the gut-brain connection—right from the source.

#### Can My Child Take Omni-Biotic Stress Release KidsWith Other Supplements And / Or Medications?

Omni-Biotic Stress Release Kids is designed to support digestion, a balanced gut microbiome and the gut-brain connection. In most cases,Omni-Biotic Stress Release Kids can be safely taken alongside other supplements and medications. This formulation is designed to be gentle, well-tolerated, and supportive of overall health, making it a great addition to your child’s wellness routine.

Because every child is unique, we recommend checking with your pediatrician or healthcare provider before introducing a new supplement.

#### What Are The Probiotic Strains Included In Omni-Biotic Stress Release Kids?

Omni-Biotic Stress Release Kids contains 9 specially selected, scientifically tested, well-characterized probiotic strains:

Lactobacillus casei W56  
Lactobacillus acidophilus W22  
Lactobacillus paracasei W20  
Bifidobacterium lactis W51  
Lactobacillus salivarius W24  
Lactococcus lactis W19  
Bifidobacterium lactis W52  
Lactobacillus plantarum W62  
Bifidobacterium bifidum W23

#### Why Are There Other Ingredients In Addition To The Probiotics In Omni-Biotic Stress Release Kids?

The other ingredients included in Omni-Biotic Stress Release Kids , such as corn starch or maltodextrin are specifically added to improve the delivery of the probiotic bacteria to the intestines. A small amount of corn starch serves as the carrier. The maltodextrin is a prebiotic nutrient that serves as the food for the probiotics. These ingredients provide the probiotics with the nutrients they need for their passage through the digestive tract to the intestines where they will be most effective.

#### How Does Omni-Biotic Stress Release Kids Help With Stress Management And Brain Function?

Stress negatively impacts the gut microbiome in several ways. Stress puts the body in fight or flight mode, which redirects blood flow away from the digestive organs. This can lead to digestive disturbances such as diarrhea, constipation and bloating. Prolonged periods of stress can also diminish good bacteria in the gut, contribute to a gut microbiome imbalance, and cause inflammation. Furthermore, the gut and the brain stand in constant communication with one another, and our gut microbes help produce important neurotransmitters and messenger signals for our brain.

#### How Many Colony Forming Units (CFU) Are In Omni-Biotic Stress Release Kids?

Omni-Biotic Stress Release Kids contains 3.75 billion CFU per serving / stick.

#### How Many Servings Are In One Box Of Omni-Biotic Stress Release Kids?

One box of Omni-Biotic Stress Release Kids includes 28 servings. This probiotic is shelf stable through the expiration date at room temperature.

#### Do I Have To Refrigerate This Probiotic?

No, Omni-Biotic Stress Release Kids does not need to be refrigerated.

#### How Does Omni-Biotic Ensure The Quality And Effectiveness Of Its Probiotics?

Omni-Biotic probiotics are developed by Institut AllergoSan’s “Competence Center for Microbiome Research,” based on over 25 years of gut microbiome research and 100+ clinical studies using Omni-Biotic probiotics.

Each strain of probiotic bacteria is tested for how effective it is in achieving a specific health outcome. The team then tests the combination of strains that is included in one Omni-Biotic probiotic formulation to make sure they work well together to achieve a desired outcome. All Omni-Biotic probiotics are tested for efficacy in their final version in clinical studies. Key clinical studies using Omni-Biotic can be found in the Research / Education website section.

Our products are developed by Institut AllergoSan in accordance with the highest quality criteria for probiotics presented by the FDA, World Health Organization (WHO), World Gastroenterology Organization (WGO), and Austrian/German Societies for Probiotic Medicine (OePROM / DePROM).

#### Are Omni-Biotic Probiotics Suitable For Vegetarians And Vegans?

All Omni-Biotic probiotics available on omnibioticlife.com are vegan, lactose, gluten, and soy-free, and made up of non-GMO ingredients.

## FAQ

#### What age group is the Omni-Biotic Stress Release Kids probiotic suitable for?

Omni-Biotic Stress Release Kids is suitable for children and toddlers from 3 years and up.

#### How Should My Child Best Take Omni-Biotic Stress Release Kids?

Children ages 3 and up take 1 - 2 Omni-Biotic Stress Release Kids packets daily (=1.2 g). Tear open the packet along the perforation and allow the contents to dissolve directly on the tongue - no water needed.

For best results take on an empty stomach. This helps the probiotic bacteria move through the acidic environment of the stomach as quickly as possible, and they reach their destination in the intestines alive and metabolically active.

Do not exceed daily recommended dose.

#### Can My Child Take Omni-Biotic Stress Release Kids More Than Once Daily?

Yes, children and toddlers 3 years and up can take up to 2 Omni-Biotic Stress Release packets daily.

For best results take on an empty stomach. Do not exceed daily recommended dose.

#### Why Is It Beneficial for My Child To Take Omni-Biotic Stress Release Kids?

Omni-Biotic Stress Release Kids is specially formulated to support your child’s gut microbiome, which plays a vital role in emotional balance, focus, and overall well-being.

The gut and brain are deeply connected through the gut-brain axis—a communication network where a balanced gut helps regulate mood, stress response, and cognitive function. When children experience stress, it can disrupt their gut microbiome and increase intestinal inflammation, which may negatively affect this important connection.

By nurturing a healthy gut, Omni-Biotic Stress Release Kids helps support your child’s ability to manage everyday stress, stay calm, and maintain focus. This gentle, kid-sized version of our clinically studied adult formula is designed to provide targeted support for the gut-brain connection—right from the source.

#### Can My Child Take Omni-Biotic Stress Release KidsWith Other Supplements And / Or Medications?

Omni-Biotic Stress Release Kids is designed to support digestion, a balanced gut microbiome and the gut-brain connection. In most cases,Omni-Biotic Stress Release Kids can be safely taken alongside other supplements and medications. This formulation is designed to be gentle, well-tolerated, and supportive of overall health, making it a great addition to your child’s wellness routine.

Because every child is unique, we recommend checking with your pediatrician or healthcare provider before introducing a new supplement.

#### What Are The Probiotic Strains Included In Omni-Biotic Stress Release Kids?

Omni-Biotic Stress Release Kids contains 9 specially selected, scientifically tested, well-characterized probiotic strains:

Lactobacillus casei W56  
Lactobacillus acidophilus W22  
Lactobacillus paracasei W20  
Bifidobacterium lactis W51  
Lactobacillus salivarius W24  
Lactococcus lactis W19  
Bifidobacterium lactis W52  
Lactobacillus plantarum W62  
Bifidobacterium bifidum W23

#### Why Are There Other Ingredients In Addition To The Probiotics In Omni-Biotic Stress Release Kids?

The other ingredients included in Omni-Biotic Stress Release Kids , such as corn starch or maltodextrin are specifically added to improve the delivery of the probiotic bacteria to the intestines. A small amount of corn starch serves as the carrier. The maltodextrin is a prebiotic nutrient that serves as the food for the probiotics. These ingredients provide the probiotics with the nutrients they need for their passage through the digestive tract to the intestines where they will be most effective.

#### How Does Omni-Biotic Stress Release Kids Help With Stress Management And Brain Function?

Stress negatively impacts the gut microbiome in several ways. Stress puts the body in fight or flight mode, which redirects blood flow away from the digestive organs. This can lead to digestive disturbances such as diarrhea, constipation and bloating. Prolonged periods of stress can also diminish good bacteria in the gut, contribute to a gut microbiome imbalance, and cause inflammation. Furthermore, the gut and the brain stand in constant communication with one another, and our gut microbes help produce important neurotransmitters and messenger signals for our brain.

#### How Many Colony Forming Units (CFU) Are In Omni-Biotic Stress Release Kids?

Omni-Biotic Stress Release Kids contains 3.75 billion CFU per serving / stick.

#### How Many Servings Are In One Box Of Omni-Biotic Stress Release Kids?

One box of Omni-Biotic Stress Release Kids includes 28 servings. This probiotic is shelf stable through the expiration date at room temperature.

#### Do I Have To Refrigerate This Probiotic?

No, Omni-Biotic Stress Release Kids does not need to be refrigerated.

#### How Does Omni-Biotic Ensure The Quality And Effectiveness Of Its Probiotics?

Omni-Biotic probiotics are developed by Institut AllergoSan’s “Competence Center for Microbiome Research,” based on over 25 years of gut microbiome research and 100+ clinical studies using Omni-Biotic probiotics.

Each strain of probiotic bacteria is tested for how effective it is in achieving a specific health outcome. The team then tests the combination of strains that is included in one Omni-Biotic probiotic formulation to make sure they work well together to achieve a desired outcome. All Omni-Biotic probiotics are tested for efficacy in their final version in clinical studies. Key clinical studies using Omni-Biotic can be found in the Research / Education website section.

Our products are developed by Institut AllergoSan in accordance with the highest quality criteria for probiotics presented by the FDA, World Health Organization (WHO), World Gastroenterology Organization (WGO), and Austrian/German Societies for Probiotic Medicine (OePROM / DePROM).

#### Are Omni-Biotic Probiotics Suitable For Vegetarians And Vegans?

All Omni-Biotic probiotics available on omnibioticlife.com are vegan, lactose, gluten, and soy-free, and made up of non-GMO ingredients.

That being said, it is always best to check with your individual healthcare practitioner for all supplements you are taking, especially during pregnancy and breastfeeding.

#### Is this Product Safe to Use for Children?

Yes, most Omni-Biotic probiotics are safe for children. Omni-Biotic Hetox is not recommended for children.

For babies and up to one year of age: Omni-Biotic Panda was specifically developed for babies and young children to support the healthy development of the baby’s gut microbiome, digestive system, and immune function. It has also been shown in clinical studies to improve symptoms of infant colic and to reduce the risk of childhood allergies, such as eczema. [...] For children between one and three years of age: If the child is benefiting from Omni-Biotic Panda, this is often a good choice to continue until three years of age. Other probiotic formulations (except Omni-Biotic Hetox) can be taken at half of one sachet per day (i.e., half of the daily recommended dose for adults).

For children older than three years of age: Children above three years of age typically respond well to taking the regular daily recommended dose.

To improve the taste of the probiotic, you can dissolve it in infant formula, milk or yogurt, a dairy alternative, lukewarm soups and apple juice. Avoid juices that are too acidic such as orange juice as these negatively impact the probiotic bacteria.

A healthy and varied gut microbiome is crucial for maintaining overall health, while a depleted and unbalanced microbiome can contribute to various diseases. The microbiome plays a fundamental role in essential functions such as immunity, detoxification, and neurological processes. Certain bacteria within the gut are key supporters of these vital activities. The Dynamic Probiotic Duo aims to enhance gut health and digestion, alongside bolstering immune response, cognitive abilities, emotional equilibrium, and mood.
