#### What is the Dynamic Probiotic Duo?

This bundle is designed to support your physical and mental health. Based on over 30 years of gut microbiome research, the Dynamic Probiotic Duo is curated by Omni-Biotic’s Founder, Anita Frauwallner, with the goal to help you achieve your most vital self.

In the morning, you take Omni-Biotic Balance to optimize the gut flora, support healthy digestion, and balance immune function.

In the evening, you take Omni-Biotic Stress Release probiotic to replenish the good bacteria in the gut, repair the gut barrier, reduce local and systemic inflammation, and improve cognition and mood.

#### What are the Health Benefits of this Bundle?

Taking these complimentary Omni-Biotic probiotics will:

#### Who is the Dynamic Probiotic Duo Best Suited For?

The Dynamic Probiotic Duo is best suited for individuals who are seeking to support both their physical and mental wellbeing by restoring and nourishing their gut health. It's a comprehensive solution that supports both body and mind, making it ideal for people with active lifestyles or those who face regular stressors but want to remain physically and mentally sharp.

#### What Strains of Beneficial Bacteria Are Included in this Bundle?

Omni-Biotic Stress Release contains nine specially selected bacterial strains:

Lactobacillus casei W56  
Lactococcus lactis W19  
Lactobacillus acidophilus W22  
Bifidobacterium lactis W52  
Lactobacillus paracasei W20  
Lactobacillus plantarum W62  
Bifidobacterium lactis W51  
Bifidobacterium bifidum W23  
Lactobacillus salivarius W24

Omni-Biotic Balance contains six specially selected bacterial strains:

Bifidobacterium animals W53  
Lactobacillus acidophilus W55  
Lactobacillus salivarius W57  
Enterococcus faecium W54  
Lactococcus lactis W58  
Lactobacillus casei W56

#### Why Are There Other Ingredients Included in Omni-Biotic Probiotics?

The freeze-dried powder of Omni-Biotic probiotics contains different prebiotic ingredients that serve as food for the beneficial bacteria. When the probiotic powder is dissolved in water prior to intake, the freeze-dried probiotic bacteria rehydrate and begin to consume these prebiotic nutrients. This makes them strong for their passage through the digestive tract, and ensures high probiotic survival rates into the gut.

If you extend the activation time of Omni-Biotic to up to 30 minutes, the bacteria almost completely metabolize their food so that, at most, only a few molecules of these substances enter your body.

#### Which Probiotic Formulation Should I Continue With After Completing This Bundle?

You can stick with your favorite probiotic formulation from the Dynamic Probiotic Duo or you can take our [Probiotic Fit Quiz](https://www.omnibioticlife.com/take-quiz/) to find the best formulation for your current health needs. We’re also happy to answer any questions and help guide you – contact us at info@omnibioticlife.com or 914-615-9914.

#### How to Best Take the Probiotics in the Dynamic Probiotic Duo?

For this bundle it is recommended to take Omni-Biotic Balance in the morning and Omni-Biotic Stress Release in the evening. Please note that Omni-Biotic probiotics are best taken on an empty stomach. 

#### Can I Take the Dynamic Probiotic Duo Alongside Other Medications/Supplements?

Yes, Omni-Biotic probiotics contain only strains of bacteria that naturally occur in the human intestine, and no chemical agents that can interact with other supplements or medications.

It is, however, recommended to take Omni-Biotic probiotics at least one hour away from other supplements and/or medications.

#### Can I Dissolve Omni-Biotic in Anything Other than Water?

Omni-Biotic probiotics are manufactured in the form of freeze-dried bacteria that need to be reactivated before intake. Due to its neutral pH value, room temperature water creates the optimal environment to activate the bacteria and to energize them for their journey through your gastro-intestinal tract.

If you prefer, milk or yogurt, as well as apple juice are also well suited to rehydrate Omni-Biotic.

Please note that, in general, the liquid in which you dissolve Omni-Biotic should be under 100 degrees Fahrenheit and non-acidic. If the liquid is too cold, the bacteria cannot sufficiently “wake up” from their freeze-dried state. If the liquid is too hot, then they will die before you drink them. Juices and coffee are too acidic for the probiotic bacteria to survive.

#### Are There Any Side Effects of Using this Product?

Depending on the health of your gut microbiome, it may be that you experience mild digestive issues (e.g. mild bloating, gas, diarrhea) the first few days of using this product. This is a sign that your gut flora is rebalancing and potentially eliminating any pathogens. If this is the case, it is recommended that you introduce Omni-Biotic slowly over the course of a few days (beginning with the amount of a knife-tip) to minimize possible digestive side effects. Such situations are rare and only occur in about 5% of users.

#### How Should the Product be Stored?

All Omni-Biotic probiotics are shelf-stable at room temperature. They should be stored in a cool and dry place, and do not need to be refrigerated.

#### What is the Shelf Life of this Product?

Omni-Biotic probiotics have a shelf life of 12-18 months.

#### Do Omni-Biotic Probiotics Have Regulatory Approval?

All Omni-Biotic products available in the U.S. have FDA GRAS (Generally Recognized As Safe) status and meet the quality criteria for medically relevant pro and synbiotics.

Omni-Biotic products are developed by Institut AllergoSan in accordance with quality criteria of the World Health Organization (WHO), the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA), the World Gastroenterology Organization (WGO), and the Austrian/German Societies for Probiotic Medicine (OePROM / DePROM).

#### Are Omni-Biotic Probiotics Suitable For Vegetarians And Vegans?

Almost all Omni-Biotic products available on omnibioticlife.com are certified vegan, as well as lactose, gluten, and soy-free, and made up of non-GMO ingredients. Please note that our Omni-Logic Plus prebiotic contains a small amount of lactose and is therefore considered vegetarian.

#### Is this Product Safe to Use for Pregnant or Breastfeeding Women?

Yes, all Omni-Biotic probiotics are safe for use during pregnancy, post-partum, while breastfeeding and when trying to conceive. In fact, taking a high-quality probiotic supplement during pregnancy and the first few months after birth will help support a healthy pregnancy and help lay the foundation for the baby’s health.

That being said, it is always best to check with your individual healthcare practitioner for all supplements you are taking, especially during pregnancy and breastfeeding.

#### Is this Product Safe to Use for Children?

Yes, most Omni-Biotic probiotics are safe for children. Omni-Biotic Hetox is not recommended for children.

For babies and up to one year of age: Omni-Biotic Panda was specifically developed for babies and young children to support the healthy development of the baby’s gut microbiome, digestive system, and immune function. It has also been shown in clinical studies to improve symptoms of infant colic and to reduce the risk of childhood allergies, such as eczema.

For children between one and three years of age: If the child is benefiting from Omni-Biotic Panda, this is often a good choice to continue until three years of age. Other probiotic formulations (except Omni-Biotic Hetox) can be taken at half of one sachet per day (i.e., half of the daily recommended dose for adults).

For children older than three years of age: Children above three years of age typically respond well to taking the regular daily recommended dose.

To improve the taste of the probiotic, you can dissolve it in infant formula, milk or yogurt, a dairy alternative, lukewarm soups and apple juice. Avoid juices that are too acidic such as orange juice as these negatively impact the probiotic bacteria.

#### What is Your Return Policy?

To initiate a return or exchange, please kindly contact our Customer Service team at info@omnibioticlife.com or (914) 615-9914. Claims for shortages or damages must be reported within 10 days of receiving your order.

## Customer Reviews

My body is tolerating the probiotics well (I've had issue with other brands in the past) and it seems to be helping in terms of bloating and discomfort. I have crohn's and can be really sensitive to any changes in my gut but this seems to be helping me all around.

I first starting taking the Omni Biotic Balance hoping it would help with digestive issues, which it did! Feeling less gassy and fewer grumbly stomach after eating. I’ve now added the Stress Relief and taking the two daily. As I am in my early 70’s I think of this as maintenance that will be beneficial to my overall health physically and mentally. I’m going to keep using the duo.

I had lots of unexplained acid reflux-had multiple medical tests to rule things out and took every prescription GERD medicine. A friend recommended Omnibiotic and I couldn’t be happier.It regulated my system and I can sleep better because I don’t wake up chocking on reflux. I also notice significantly less bloating and consistent bowel movements.

I used to struggle going to the bathroom and was constantly bloated. Omni Biotic was such a game changer. It completely transformed my gut <3

If you’re looking for a high-quality probiotic with noticeable results, I definitely recommend it . It’s become part of my daily self-care routine ❤️❤️

The Dynamic Probiotic Duo

A healthy and varied gut microbiome is crucial for maintaining overall health, while a depleted and unbalanced microbiome can contribute to various diseases. The microbiome plays a fundamental role in essential functions such as immunity, detoxification, and neurological processes. Certain bacteria within the gut are key supporters of these vital activities. The Dynamic Probiotic Duo aims to enhance gut health and digestion, alongside bolstering immune response, cognitive abilities, emotional equilibrium, and mood.

## Relevant Clinical Studies

Clinical studies from leading research centers, universities, and hospitals using the final formulation of Omni-Biotic Stress Release and Omni-Biotic Balance.

CLINICAL STUDY #1

Influence of secretory Immunoglobuline A (slgA) deficites for sport students through dietary supplements.

Published: 1999

Findings Include:

75% improvement in sIgA levels after 4 weeks of taking Omni-Biotic Balance

CLINICAL STUDY #2

Effects of an oral synbiotic on the gastrointestinal immune system and microbiota in patients with diarrhea-predominant irritable bowel syndrome.

Published: 2019

Findings Include:

80% reduction in Irritable Bowel Syndrome Associated Symptoms, an increased microbial diversity, short-chain fatty acid production and improvement in the gut barrier.

CLINICAL STUDY #3

Probiotics drive gut microbiome triggering emotional brain signatures.

Published: 2018

Findings Include:

Increase in positive mental disposition as well as decreased vulnerability to depression, hopelessness, and risk aversion. Additionally, this study showed individuals had more stable decision making and recall when challenged with unpleasant stimuli.

For children older than three years of age: Children above three years of age typically respond well to taking the regular daily recommended dose.

To improve the taste of the probiotic, you can dissolve it in infant formula, milk or yogurt, a dairy alternative, lukewarm soups and apple juice. Avoid juices that are too acidic such as orange juice as these negatively impact the probiotic bacteria.

#### What is Your Return Policy?

To initiate a return or exchange, please kindly contact our Customer Service team at info@omnibioticlife.com or (914) 615-9914. Claims for shortages or damages must be reported within 10 days of receiving your order.

Gut-Liver Axis & Detoxification Support

The gut-liver axis represents a bidirectional communication network that links the large intestine and the liver, pivotal in supporting liver function and detoxification.

The liver secretes bile acids and various bioactive substances that aid in digestion and influence the composition the gut microbiome. The gut, through its resident microbes, produces byproducts that are essential in reinforcing the gut barrier and supporting proper elimination of toxins.

Disruptions in this delicate balance can have adverse effects. When unwanted substances leak into the bloodstream, they are transported to the liver, which now has to work extra hard to rid the body of toxins. Over time, this increased burden can lead to liver overload and impaired liver function, which impacts detoxification, metabolism, and energy levels.

Our trailblazing probiotic targeting the gut-liver axis has shown in clinical studies to support liver function and facilitate the natural detoxification process.

## Related Articles

## FAQ

#### How Should I Best Take Omni-Biotic Hetox?

For Omni-Biotic Hetox probiotic, please follow these intake instructions:

1. Stir one sachet of Omni-Biotic Hetox in approximately 4 ounces/125 mL of room temperature water or other non-acidic liquid (dairy and non-dairy milk, dairy and non-dairy yogurt, apple juice).
2. Wait 1 minute for probiotic reconstitution/activation.
3. Stir again and enjoy!

Take one sachet daily or as directed by your healthcare practitioner. Omni-Biotic Hetox is best consumed on an empty stomach, for example right after waking up or before going to bed in the evening.

#### Can I Mix Omni-Biotic Hetox Into Anything Other Than Water?

Yes. Omni-Biotic probiotics can also be mixed into non-acidic liquids such as apple juice, milk or yogurt (or non-dairy alternatives), apple sauce and lukewarm soups. Acidic beverages such as coffee, tea and orange juice should be avoided. Make sure the liquid does not exceed 104 degrees Fahrenheit as this can kill the probiotics.

#### Can I Take Omni-Biotic Hetox More Than Once Daily?

In most cases, taking Omni-Biotic Hetox once daily is sufficient. Some individuals may benefit from taking Omni-Biotic Hetox twice daily.

#### Can I Take Omni-Biotic Hetox On An Empty Stomach, Or Should I Take The Probiotic With Food / A Meal?

All Omni-Biotic probiotics are best taken on an empty stomach. This helps the probiotic bacteria move through the acidic environment of the stomach as quickly as possible, and they reach their destination in the intestines alive and metabolically active.

#### Can I Take Omni-Biotic Hetox With Other Supplements And / Or Medications?

Yes. Omni-Biotic probiotics contain only strains of bacteria that naturally occur in the human intestine, and no chemical agents that can interact with other supplements or medications.

#### What Are The Probiotic Strains Included In Omni-Biotic Hetox?

Omni-Biotic Hetox contains eight specifically selected, scientifically tested, well-characterized probiotic strains:

* Lactobacillus acidophilus W37
* Bifidobacterium bifidum W23
* Lactobacillus brevis W63
* Bifidobacterium lactis W52
* Lactobacillus casei W56
* Lactococcus lactis W19
* Lactobacillus salivarius W24
* Lactococcus lactis W58

#### Why Are There Other Ingredients In Addition To The Probiotics In Omni-Biotic Hetox?

The other ingredients included in Omni-Biotic Hetox are: Non-GMO corn starch, maltodextrin, plant protein (from peas), potassium chloride, magnesium sulphate, enzymes (amylases), manganese sulphate.

These ingredients are specifically added to improve the delivery of the probiotic bacteria to the intestines. A small amount of non-GMO corn starch acts as the carrier. The other ingredients are prebiotic nutrient that serve as the food for the probiotics. When the powder is dissolved in liquid, the probiotics can hydrate and consume these specialized nutrients, and become strong for their passage through the digestive tract to the intestines where they will be most effective.

#### How Can Omni-Biotic Hetox Probiotic Support Liver Health And Detoxification?

The liver is one of the body’s main detoxification organs. The gut and the liver are connected via the portal vein. The blood from the intestines is passed on to the liver for detoxification. If the gut is inflamed and the gut barrier is leaky, toxins and other unwanted substances can pass through into the blood stream and reach the liver. Over time, the liver becomes overburdened by this constant inflow of toxins. As a result, liver function becomes weaker. This can result in changes in metabolic function such as insulin regulation, weight gain, fatigue and changes in metabolic performance.

#### How Many Colony Forming Units (CFU) Are In Omni-Biotic Hetox?

Omni-Biotic Hetox contains 15 billion CFU per serving/sachet.

#### How Many Servings Are In One Box Of Omni-Biotic Hetox?

One box of Omni-Biotic Hetox includes 30 servings. This probiotic is shelf stable through the expiration date at room temperature.

#### Do I Have To Refrigerate This Probiotic?

No, Omni-Biotic Hetox does not need to be refrigerated.

#### Do Omni-Biotic Probiotics Have Regulatory Approval?

All Omni-Biotic products meet “Generally Recognized As Safe” (GRAS) criteria specified by the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA).

Our products are developed by Institut AllergoSan in accordance with the highest quality criteria for probiotics presented by the FDA, World Health Organization (WHO), World Gastroenterology Organization (WGO), and Austrian/German Societies for Probiotic Medicine (OePROM / DePROM).

#### What Kind Of Testing Do You Do On Omni-Biotic Probiotics?

Omni-Biotic probiotics are developed by Institut AllergoSan “Competence Center for Microbiome Research,” based on over 25 years of gut microbiome research and 100+ clinical studies using our products.

Each strain of probiotic bacteria for how effective it is in achieving a specific health outcome. The team then tests the combination of strains that is included in one Omni-Biotic probiotic to make sure they work well together to achieve a desired outcome. All Omni-Biotic probiotics are tested for efficacy in their final version in clinical studies.

Key clinical studies using Omni-Biotic can be found in the [Research / Education website section](https://c29aac-2.myshopify.com/pages/gut-liver-axis).

#### Where Can I Find The Clinical Studies That Test Omni-Biotic Hetox?

You can find the clinical studies using Omni-Biotic Hetox here:  
[www.omnibioticlife.com/gut-liver-axis](https://c29aac-2.myshopify.com/pages/gut-liver-axis)

#### Are Omni-Biotic Probiotics Suitable For Vegetarians And Vegans?

All Omni-Biotic probiotics available on omnibioticlife.com are vegan, lactose, gluten, and soy-free, and made up of non-GMO ingredients.

#### Can Omni-Biotic Be Used When Trying To Conceive, During Pregnancy, Postpartum And While Breastfeeding?

Yes, all Omni-Biotic probiotics are safe for use when trying to conceive, during pregnancy, postpartum and while breastfeeding.

In fact, supporting gut health via probiotics and prebiotics during pregnancy and the first few months after birth will help support a healthy pregnancy and lay the foundation for the infant’s health. Check out our prenatal and infant probiotic [here](https://c29aac-2.myshopify.com/pages/prenatal-baby).

#### Is Omni-Biotic Hetox Safe For Children?

Omni-Biotic HETOX is not appropriate for children under three years of age. For children over three years of age, Omni-Biotic HETOX should only be given under the supervision of a healthcare practitioner.

Gut-Liver Axis & Detoxification Support

The gut-liver axis represents a bidirectional communication network that links the large intestine and the liver, pivotal in supporting liver function and detoxification.

The liver secretes bile acids and various bioactive substances that aid in digestion and influence the composition the gut microbiome. The gut, through its resident microbes, produces byproducts that are essential in reinforcing the gut barrier and supporting proper elimination of toxins.

Disruptions in this delicate balance can have adverse effects. When unwanted substances leak into the bloodstream, they are transported to the liver, which now has to work extra hard to rid the body of toxins. Over time, this increased burden can lead to liver overload and impaired liver function, which impacts detoxification, metabolism, and energy levels.

Our trailblazing probiotic targeting the gut-liver axis has shown in clinical studies to support liver function and facilitate the natural detoxification process.

## FAQ

#### How Should I Best Take Omni-Biotic Hetox?

For Omni-Biotic Hetox probiotic, please follow these intake instructions:

1. Stir one sachet of Omni-Biotic Hetox in approximately 4 ounces/125 mL of room temperature water or other non-acidic liquid (dairy and non-dairy milk, dairy and non-dairy yogurt, apple juice).
2. Wait 1 minute for probiotic reconstitution/activation.
3. Stir again and enjoy!

Take one sachet daily or as directed by your healthcare practitioner. Omni-Biotic Hetox is best consumed on an empty stomach, for example right after waking up or before going to bed in the evening.

#### Can I Mix Omni-Biotic Hetox Into Anything Other Than Water?

Yes. Omni-Biotic probiotics can also be mixed into non-acidic liquids such as apple juice, milk or yogurt (or non-dairy alternatives), apple sauce and lukewarm soups. Acidic beverages such as coffee, tea and orange juice should be avoided. Make sure the liquid does not exceed 104 degrees Fahrenheit as this can kill the probiotics.

#### Can I Take Omni-Biotic Hetox More Than Once Daily?

In most cases, taking Omni-Biotic Hetox once daily is sufficient. Some individuals may benefit from taking Omni-Biotic Hetox twice daily.

#### Can I Take Omni-Biotic Hetox On An Empty Stomach, Or Should I Take The Probiotic With Food / A Meal?

All Omni-Biotic probiotics are best taken on an empty stomach. This helps the probiotic bacteria move through the acidic environment of the stomach as quickly as possible, and they reach their destination in the intestines alive and metabolically active.

#### Can I Take Omni-Biotic Hetox With Other Supplements And / Or Medications?

Yes. Omni-Biotic probiotics contain only strains of bacteria that naturally occur in the human intestine, and no chemical agents that can interact with other supplements or medications.

#### What Are The Probiotic Strains Included In Omni-Biotic Hetox?

Omni-Biotic Hetox contains eight specifically selected, scientifically tested, well-characterized probiotic strains:

* Lactobacillus acidophilus W37
* Bifidobacterium bifidum W23
* Lactobacillus brevis W63
* Bifidobacterium lactis W52
* Lactobacillus casei W56
* Lactococcus lactis W19
* Lactobacillus salivarius W24
* Lactococcus lactis W58

#### Why Are There Other Ingredients In Addition To The Probiotics In Omni-Biotic Hetox?

The other ingredients included in Omni-Biotic Hetox are: Non-GMO corn starch, maltodextrin, plant protein (from peas), potassium chloride, magnesium sulphate, enzymes (amylases), manganese sulphate.

These ingredients are specifically added to improve the delivery of the probiotic bacteria to the intestines. A small amount of non-GMO corn starch acts as the carrier. The other ingredients are prebiotic nutrient that serve as the food for the probiotics. When the powder is dissolved in liquid, the probiotics can hydrate and consume these specialized nutrients, and become strong for their passage through the digestive tract to the intestines where they will be most effective.

#### How Can Omni-Biotic Hetox Probiotic Support Liver Health And Detoxification?

The liver is one of the body’s main detoxification organs. The gut and the liver are connected via the portal vein. The blood from the intestines is passed on to the liver for detoxification. If the gut is inflamed and the gut barrier is leaky, toxins and other unwanted substances can pass through into the blood stream and reach the liver. Over time, the liver becomes overburdened by this constant inflow of toxins. As a result, liver function becomes weaker. This can result in changes in metabolic function such as insulin regulation, weight gain, fatigue and changes in metabolic performance.

#### How Many Colony Forming Units (CFU) Are In Omni-Biotic Hetox?

Omni-Biotic Hetox contains 15 billion CFU per serving/sachet.

#### How Many Servings Are In One Box Of Omni-Biotic Hetox?

One box of Omni-Biotic Hetox includes 30 servings. This probiotic is shelf stable through the expiration date at room temperature.

#### Do I Have To Refrigerate This Probiotic?

No, Omni-Biotic Hetox does not need to be refrigerated.

#### Do Omni-Biotic Probiotics Have Regulatory Approval?

All Omni-Biotic products meet “Generally Recognized As Safe” (GRAS) criteria specified by the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA).

Our products are developed by Institut AllergoSan in accordance with the highest quality criteria for probiotics presented by the FDA, World Health Organization (WHO), World Gastroenterology Organization (WGO), and Austrian/German Societies for Probiotic Medicine (OePROM / DePROM).

#### What Kind Of Testing Do You Do On Omni-Biotic Probiotics?

Omni-Biotic probiotics are developed by Institut AllergoSan “Competence Center for Microbiome Research,” based on over 25 years of gut microbiome research and 100+ clinical studies using our products.

Each strain of probiotic bacteria for how effective it is in achieving a specific health outcome. The team then tests the combination of strains that is included in one Omni-Biotic probiotic to make sure they work well together to achieve a desired outcome. All Omni-Biotic probiotics are tested for efficacy in their final version in clinical studies.

Key clinical studies using Omni-Biotic can be found in the [Research / Education website section](https://c29aac-2.myshopify.com/pages/gut-liver-axis).

#### Where Can I Find The Clinical Studies That Test Omni-Biotic Hetox?

You can find the clinical studies using Omni-Biotic Hetox here:  
[www.omnibioticlife.com/gut-liver-axis](https://c29aac-2.myshopify.com/pages/gut-liver-axis)

#### Are Omni-Biotic Probiotics Suitable For Vegetarians And Vegans?

All Omni-Biotic probiotics available on omnibioticlife.com are vegan, lactose, gluten, and soy-free, and made up of non-GMO ingredients.

#### Can Omni-Biotic Be Used When Trying To Conceive, During Pregnancy, Postpartum And While Breastfeeding?

Yes, all Omni-Biotic probiotics are safe for use when trying to conceive, during pregnancy, postpartum and while breastfeeding.

In fact, supporting gut health via probiotics and prebiotics during pregnancy and the first few months after birth will help support a healthy pregnancy and lay the foundation for the infant’s health. Check out our prenatal and infant probiotic [here](https://c29aac-2.myshopify.com/pages/prenatal-baby).

#### Is Omni-Biotic Hetox Safe For Children?

Omni-Biotic HETOX is not appropriate for children under three years of age. For children over three years of age, Omni-Biotic HETOX should only be given under the supervision of a healthcare practitioner.
